subject: Did you see this breaking news?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Peter, did you see this important update from our team?
**[With national Republicans coalescing behind a multi-millionaire hedge fund executive viewed as “the key” to their plan to flip PA, I’m asking you to pitch in $5 or more toward our mid-month fundraising goal now. We need to be ready to take on massive GOP spending from Mitch McConnell and the GOP establishment.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230715-2?refcode=em20230715-2&refcode2=311_552475_FWI5EI&akid=311%2E552475%2EFWI5EI)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230715-2?refcode=em20230715-2&refcode2=311_552475_FWI5EI&akid=311%2E552475%2EFWI5EI)**
Thank you,
Tiernan Donohue
Campaign Manager, Bob Casey for Senate
* * *

[](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/182?t=1&akid=311%2E552475%2EFWI5EI)

**BREAKING NEWS:**
A multi-millionaire hedge fund executive in Pennsylvania who sold out PA workers to enrich himself and his Wall Street friends is **“the key to the GOP's 2024 senate plan.”** [HuffPost] [**We need to respond and fight back NOW. Will you rush a donation to defend PA’s Senate seat?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230715-2?amount=5&refcode=em20230715-2&refcode2=311_552475_FWI5EI&akid=311%2E552475%2EFWI5EI) **[Rush a Donation ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230715-2?amount=5&refcode=em20230715-2&refcode2=311_552475_FWI5EI&akid=311%2E552475%2EFWI5EI)**
---
Peter,
This is HUGE news: HuffPost just confirmed that top Republicans are “aggressively recruiting” a multi-millionaire hedge fund executive to try to buy Pennsylvania’s Senate seat — which could decide control of the Senate.
**This would-be GOP opponent could easily self-fund his campaign and outspend us.** Not only that, Mitch McConnell named PA as one of his top targets for 2024 — so we’ll be up against immense super PAC and national Republican establishment support.
[**If you’ve been waiting for the right time to support our campaign, this is it, Peter. We can’t let ourselves be outspent — will you rush $5 or anything you can chip in today so we can raise early resources and compete?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230715-2?refcode=em20230715-2&refcode2=311_552475_FWI5EI&akid=311%2E552475%2EFWI5EI)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230715-2?amount=5&refcode=em20230715-2&refcode2=311_552475_FWI5EI&akid=311%2E552475%2EFWI5EI)**
It only gets worse, Peter. This hedge fund executive and GOP hopeful has ties to foreign governments that pose a direct threat to the United States.
Pennsylvanians deserve someone fighting every day for their bottom line — not for billionaire royal families or the wealthy governments of other countries.
[**We need your urgent support to ensure this GOP hopeful cannot buy PA’s Senate seat with the support of Mitch McConnell and the national Republican establishment. Please, we’ll ask one more time: will you rush a donation today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230715-2?refcode=em20230715-2&refcode2=311_552475_FWI5EI&akid=311%2E552475%2EFWI5EI)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230715-2?refcode=em20230715-2&refcode2=311_552475_FWI5EI&akid=311%2E552475%2EFWI5EI)**
Thank you for stepping up,
Bob Casey for Senate

name: T. Wilson
subject: Adding fuel to the dumpster fire
body:
Jordan’s exposure to these two scandals is immense and he has never been this vulnerable. If there was ever an election where we could unseat him it is this 2024. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66558621/416755582/1649708063?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmUxNjc4ZjgtNmMyMy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Az6R_iMHGmMTJc3h14sx5qTmVLpaLjEjsPAne1o2TVo=)
---
| | Hi Friend , Oftentimes big name republicans like Majority Leader Kevin McCarthy, Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Green, and my opponent Congressman Jim Jordan, seem invulnerable. Insulated by solidly red districts and millions from the monied interests that back the extreme-right, it can seem like there’s no way we’ll ever get rid of them. Unfortunately, this may be the case with McCarthy and MTG, however thanks to recent events Jim Jordan has just become one of the most vulnerable members of the extreme right. Last month, the Supreme Court ruled that victims of Dr. Richard Strauss, a school doctor who abused hundreds of students, could sue Ohio State University and its faculty for the role they played in enabling and covering up his abuse. Having been an assistant wrestling coach at this time, Jim Jordan fed a steady stream of victims to Dr. Strauss and helped to keep his abuse operation under wraps. Then when Strauss was exposed Jordan worked on a massive coverup to prevent the abuse from seeing the light of day. Now, Jordan could very well face lawsuits from his former wrestlers along with criminal charges, potential even felonies, for the role he played in enabling and covering up the abuse. On top of this, Jim Jordan was **subpoenaed** by the House January 6th Commission for the role he played in planning and executing the Capitol Insurrection. As one of the ‘masterminds’ behind the attack, Jordan could be charged with seditious conspiracy, a charge akin to domestic terrorism. clean_body: Jordan’s exposure to these two scandals is immense and he has never been this vulnerable. If there was ever an election where we could unseat him it is this 2024. | | | = | | Hi Friend , Oftentimes big name republicans like Majority Leader Kevin McCarthy, Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Green, and my opponent Congressman Jim Jordan, seem invulnerable. Insulated by solidly red districts and millions from the monied interests that back the extreme-right, it can seem like there’s no way we’ll ever get rid of them. Unfortunately, this may be the case with McCarthy and MTG, however thanks to recent events Jim Jordan has just become one of the most vulnerable members of the extreme right. Last month, the Supreme Court ruled that victims of Dr. Richard Strauss, a school doctor who abused hundreds of students, could sue Ohio State University and its faculty for the role they played in enabling and covering up his abuse. Having been an assistant wrestling coach at this time, Jim Jordan fed a steady stream of victims to Dr. Strauss and helped to keep his abuse operation under wraps. Then when Strauss was exposed Jordan worked on a massive coverup to prevent the abuse from seeing the light of day. Now, Jordan could very well face lawsuits from his former wrestlers along with criminal charges, potential even felonies, for the role he played in enabling and covering up the abuse. On top of this, Jim Jordan was subpoenaed by the House January 6th Commission for the role he played in planning and executing the Capitol Insurrection. As one of the ‘masterminds’ behind the attack, Jordan could be charged with seditious conspiracy, a charge akin to domestic terrorism. Jordan’s exposure to these two scandals is immense and he has never been this vulnerable. If there was ever an election where we could unseat him it is this 2024. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = = | = = | | Donate= This is a once in a lifetime opportunity to bring Jordan down and I know with your support we can do it. name: Yadira (personal)
subject: Personally asking you, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
Sorry for emailing so late, but I’m still short of my critical goal

| Peter, I hate to email this late, but I need your help.

**My major mid-month deadline is tonight, and my finance team tells me we’re still running $2,000 short of our goal for my reelection campaign.** **[Can you pitch in whatever makes sense to you right now before midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66559061/416783801/535544092?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.07.15_b1_yp_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2VlN2MwNi04NzIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=emmVlM9gGFyMuOxkyniPphKp5kzko8nK4ZPHXD1ZKwQ=)**

Kevin McCarthy and far-right groups could spend multi-millions to flip this seat just like they spent millions to beat us last year.

Last year, this team defied the odds and pulled off an upset victory. I know my campaign can do it again - but it won’t be possible without your support.

**[So please, can I count on your help to fight the far-right? I’m in for a tough reelection fight, but I know with folks like you by my side, I’ll be able to win reelection and continue my fight for working-class Coloradans.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66559062/416783802/535544092?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.07.15_b1_yp_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2VlN2MwNi04NzIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=emmVlM9gGFyMuOxkyniPphKp5kzko8nK4ZPHXD1ZKwQ=)**

I’m in Congress because of you, so thank you, Peter.

_Yadira_ |

name: Pat Fallon
subject: Musk vs. Zuckerberg...Twitter 🐥 or Threads 🧵?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FALLON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,

The big news over the past week has been Mark Zuckerberg
launching his Twitter competitor, "Threads," in an
attempt to take users away from Elon Musk's social media
platform.

Why does two billionaires fighting matter to you?

Well, it's a question of what do you want internet discourse to
look like.

Do you support the unfettered, unfiltered free speech and free
expression that Elon Musk's Twitter provides?

OR

Do you support the more sanitized, controlled, moderated, and
regulated speech that's supported by Mark Zuckerberg?

I'm genuinely curious to know what you think. So please click
here to take our survey!

I always like to hear your feedback and your opinion, so please
let me know where you stand on this issue.

Thank you and God bless!

Pat Fallon

Conservative Congressman TX-04

**FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ** Dear Fellow American, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism - mostly the latter - and just how important and rare it is to get things right. In today's media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. **The New York Sun is different. It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.** Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point. When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments. The Sun's deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate. It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism. I've been impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join. **The Sun's success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. **[I highly encourage you to join the Sun today. ](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTk3LWIzYzhkYzYxMjIwNjQ4ZTdiMWEyMTk4YzVlOWY0YzAwIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZ25zb2Z5Y2NxaD9zcmM9U1BPNDA5OTQifQ/FqevuF4bT_DYrBwDxksKVA)**
---
[**Join the Sun Now →**](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTk3LWIzYzhkYzYxMjIwNjQ4ZTdiMWEyMTk4YzVlOWY0YzAwIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZ25zb2Z5Y2NxaD9zcmM9U1BPNDA5OTQifQ/lapLmEeWRobcXB3qkXdTIQ)

Every person matters in this effort. Don't wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.

**Alan Dershowitz** Columnist, The New York Sun

It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism. I've been impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join. The Sun's success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. Every person matters in this effort. Don't wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now. Alan Dershowitz Columnist, The New York Sun | Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7730qnvacinji97kdaqbtbniv44qvhcgavrrg2o_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg68or6chh2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4q25hcl3sj526j5e3dammb379pebp5af03jcueo_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg68or6chh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4tits3qkq35uo0iaag6g8hm6vgk23k5h3jms1jo_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg68or6chh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8fgkmqoka3op28qhbc9mm4a5e7045ba20hkquro_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg68or6chh2bs)

name: Kash Patel
subject: The most personal email I’ll ever send you
body:
I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znsuhrkr5udfo8mv904gm98o4fvnrtjcoqlq209g_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg6aoj2clh2bs)

Hello Friend,

I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

I have always loved my country.

That's why I've dedicated my life to being a public defender, a federal prosecutor, and a legal liaison to the United States Armed Forces. I believe in the foundational values of America - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

So when Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, _good or bad_ , it had to be published.

When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. **But this investigation changed my life forever ...**

_Trump did NOT collude with Russia_.

**My investigation discovered the FBI 's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it _intentionall_ y to get rid of President Trump.**

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are crooks who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

Once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help American patriots by offering financial assistance to whistleblowers, veterans, patriots, and some families of Jan 6 detainees.

As a former federal prosecutor, I know that we need protection if we are going to expose corrupt government gangsters.

I set a goal to raise **$45,000** by the end of the week, and we're behind in reaching that goal.

[As a personal favor, will you donate $10, $35, $50, or any amount to support these freedom fighters? Click here to rush your support before the deadline >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zurtsdricqfre24cb3s0j09kqgrd8bdcdlpol8e0_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg6aoj2clh2bs)

Conservatives, America-First patriots, or anyone who believes that Americans are **innocent** until proven guilty must join together in this fight.

Some of the Jan 6 detainees have become victims of the abuses outlined above, and we cannot leave them in solitary confinement within the D.C. prison system.

**This two-tiered justice system is a complete sham and a mockery of our constitution.**

Due process has been destroyed.

**We cannot let the justice system be hijacked and used against us. **

[I am humbly asking for your support. Join me in the fight for justice in defending patriots against abuse of the justice system by clicking here >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1cidcvp2eugaco5o4u8fjsbmpsgul9pqgdvnst0_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg6aoj2clh2bs)

Trump and the Jan 6 defendants are only the beginning. The radical left has weaponized the justice system against America-first patriots.

Whether you're a whistleblower exposing deep state corruption, a parent protesting against trans ideology in our schools, or a pro-life activist praying outside of abortion clinics, the justice system can be used against you. We need an organization to defend our supporters, and that's what Kash Foundation is doing.

**Will you help me reach my goal by donating today? Please click any link below.**

[Donate $10 >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu2m1i9ovik60dggerf07v28efn173140rir0od8_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg6aoj2clh2bs)

[Donate $50 >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk3rc5f3tmbuuto5ao5ri9kpvectkn3opj3db33o_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg6aoj2clh2bs)

[Donate $100 >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1l9hifjrcbvmr85dkv12ld3u37g6mm9vpa4rv90_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg6aoj2clh2bs)

[Donate $250 >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6846ofrdau4klmip6948ilcrqhqv1nkbt7ak1fg_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg6aoj2clh2bs)

[Donate $500 >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4jhk8baresav6efaqe8ecitv4malnmqa24c7f88_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg6aoj2clh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6jg0b2o12uuish8h6qornk5goi6eamhovrepjrg_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg6aoj2clh2bs)

[Donate $2,500 >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z28ds9cbf7nvpcoj5rhgeem356f28g5i8mv46d00_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg6aoj2clh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk0rvnejuknkirebh01ppe2epu9uoqfaa0nflmno_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg6aoj2clh2bs)

Thank you,

Kash Patel

**P.S. The radical left cannot destroy our reputations with the media like they used to. Now, they are assisted by the two-tier justice system. A legal foundation is needed to help America-first patriots with these struggles.**

I refuse to watch this sham of justice, but I need your help defending whistleblowers and America-first patriots.

[Will you help me raise $45,000 before the end of the week to support the Kash Foundation? Click here to send $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4fdhi4bagonjjq805eeasalbs8ckgvpsg0mi52o_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg6aoj2clh2bs)

body:
The end is near...

| **Final stage before digital money** [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgf9hmbscg4ej7gf4au4hpui0jbi3d6goe4ebhq8_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg6aoj2cdh2bs) The end is near... Our financial system is about to be transformed in a way that would've been unthinkable just a few years ago. And almost nobody is prepared for the chaos that follows. According to Bank of America, this overhaul is imminent - And Dr. Nomi Prins says the final stage begins in July, with the rollout of the FedNow system. To show you everything you need to know about the FedNow system - and to help you prepare - Dr. Prins has recorded a free presentation with all the details. name: James OKeefe
subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8b9ev3lobq3lb431p7jf2oaju7tm7n8p2hivvdo_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg61o72cph2bs)
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4ipdii314dsle9vsq390thljktmqvoh78ov2h00_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg61o72cph2bs)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You've seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I'm unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan's quote on leadership: "Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**."

I've been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That's why I'm writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgequkcdf7nem2h76eaq44so0g8ggdj4e8gd74vg_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg61o72cph2bs)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z44n7p839hvm26bskc2dhlvj7fgfe9k1nh21cev8_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg61o72cph2bs)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn't my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren't cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That's where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zialu9sa30jakqonfrcsfov4oftt0rnhmft2tv6g_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg61o72cph2bs)?**

When you do, I'll be following up as the case progresses but I'll also keep you informed of the great work I'm doing at OMG . . . and it's exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I'll admit is thrilling. And I'm starting armed with all of the lessons I've learned to avoid the pitfalls I've experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we're more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

**[I'm asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7dnhnapc7slhb6ie6qvufadns74e7qladh3brlg_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg61o72cph2bs)**. And I'll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zks0mb931oacmc6ibaq8f4jpjqj6emitq6muh048_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg61o72cph2bs)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O'Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z22ahmo9a8n6poa3rmhfeuae7e3jb1tfm3o7pdg8_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg61o72cph2bs)**.

---

Trump Train News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znqeqt9op3mgvkjjuacfnq72iv99g589d4clttbg_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg61o72cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4chj6eob4c5h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5c5ddsafj6hqe54h21rq2sp526klmdu2p0pjklo_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg61o72cph2bs)_

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: 2024 is the time to put up or shut up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I will never stop standing up for what I know is right—even when it goes against the grain of public opinion.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkesk44g6a41vnn63airkdnfmfh8n870cioggj0o_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg61o72cph2bs)
---
Friend, **The time for chirping from the sidelines is over.** Talk is ineffective, and that's why my message has been simple: **2024 is the time to put up or shut up**. As a leader, your job is to put the interests of the people you serve above your own political gain. I've done that in Florida, and I've watched the American people cry out for real leadership nationwide. I will never stop standing up for what I know is right--even when it goes against the grain of public opinion. The American people deserve a President with a track record of taking action and standing for what's right. The lack of action from our leaders across this country has gone on for far too long. Joe Biden has done more to damage our nation than anyone, and Kamala Harris has done nothing at all. I am DONE hearing excuses. If Republicans want to ditch the culture of losing, then it's time we try something new. In Florida, I showed the country the playbook for defeating the woke mob:
* Giving parents back their voice in the classroom by BANNING CRT and pornographic content for young kids

* STANDING UP against woke corporations who have tried to force taxpayers to fund an ESG agenda

* DEFEATING Faucism and giving back Floridians the freedom to breathe and see their families after the elites in DC shut down the country

I'm tired of seeing Republicans lose. _A_ _ren 't you, Friend_ _?_ I promise you, with me as your candidate and President, Republicans will forget this culture of losing once and for all. To make sure we're able to achieve this, I am asking for your continued support. **[If you can, will you pitch in?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt5heorh23jcnl81b4q8aeqqobistqmpv8uujpc0_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg61o72cph2bs "If you can, will you pitch in?")**

---

---

---
| | | [DONATE $100](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8bq90b5p1ju2s0cmcjhv4s3avt7t0dchkan09sg_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg61o72cph2bs)
---
| | | | | [DONATE $150](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdojf616g16fj4njgdcdhtues9ugilumi4gaqbk0_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg61o72cph2bs)
---
| | | [DONATE $250](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr77f29sumcpck0bm5p6htb0oplkonje8hkrkspg_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg61o72cph2bs)
---
_The time to act is now. The time for leadership is now._ 2024 is going to be the year that our Great American Comeback takes shape. Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. We **will** fight back and WIN. I am humbly asking for your support today, Friend. Join me, and we will put an end to the culture of losing that has surrounded the Republican party. We will keep the woke indoctrination away from kids, the way we live our lives, the curriculum taught in schools, and the consumer choices we make.
---

In Freedom,

Ron DeSantis
---
| | [STAND WITH TEAM DESANTIS: DONATE TODAY](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9c8qa35abvb831n33cjnha5s3k9unf49h53f9a0_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg61o72cph2bs)
---
|
**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvjvoseq0ef906lqvk51149n8164bsvc55s9gvq8_rp22sh2s8i66o74slg61o72cph2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

clean_body: I will never stop standing up for what I know is right—even when it goes against the grain of public opinion. | | | | | | | | | | Friend, The time for chirping from the sidelines is over. Talk is ineffective, and that's why my message has been simple: 2024 is the time to put up or shut up. As a leader, your job is to put the interests of the people you serve above your own political gain. I've done that in Florida, and I've watched the American people cry out for real leadership nationwide. I will never stop standing up for what I know is right--even when it goes against the grain of public opinion. The American people deserve a President with a track record of taking action and standing for what's right. The lack of action from our leaders across this country has gone on for far too long. Joe Biden has done more to damage our nation than anyone, and Kamala Harris has done nothing at all. I am DONE hearing excuses. If Republicans want to ditch the culture of losing, then it's time we try something new. In Florida, I showed the country the playbook for defeating the woke mob: Giving parents back their voice in the classroom by BANNING CRT and pornographic content for young kids STANDING UP against woke corporations who have tried to force taxpayers to fund an ESG agenda DEFEATING Faucism and giving back Floridians the freedom to breathe and see their families after the elites in DC shut down the country I'm tired of seeing Republicans lose. A ren 't you, Friend ? I promise you, with me as your candidate and President, Republicans will forget this culture of losing once and for all. To make sure we're able to achieve this, I am asking for your continued support. "If you can, will you pitch in?" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | The time to act is now. The time for leadership is now. 2024 is going to be the year that our Great American Comeback takes shape. Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. We will fight back and WIN. I am humbly asking for your support today, Friend. Join me, and we will put an end to the culture of losing that has surrounded the Republican party. We will keep the woke indoctrination away from kids, the way we live our lives, the curriculum taught in schools, and the consumer choices we make. | | Our Great American Comeback is attainable as long as we're willing to fight for it. In Freedom, | Ron DeSantis | | | Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z18cjo6flb9bbmpouj4ufo7kkcgivkgfb0i3tmgg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli64ob4cdh2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z0vn3gds67ka2b2iq459q5gtaq7a2k3k2ajh6oi0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli64ob4cdh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zn3544qr91csgtjvd3454hv71bacnkutc7e4fiu8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli64ob4cdh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zis4mcdj068fdn4ka3dpa5nm39noubnl20knd4p0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli64ob4cdh2bs)

name: Rubio, Marco
subject: Ignore if you can’t handle this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee
body:
Please read this message to the end, but only if you’re prepared to handle the reality of our situation.

| |
---
| | | It's Marco. Please read this message to the end, but only if you’re prepared to handle the reality of our situation. With only about 30% of folks opening these messages, I believe that by opening this, you’re someone who can handle it. I know it's hard to tell fact from fiction these days, but I’m going to level with you and tell you the truth.

On top of only about 30% of our friends opening these messages, only about 1% will go the extra mile by donating. Conservatives like me rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to raise money for our cause, so I'm humbly asking you to read this all the way through. If you still think your $1 doesn't matter, then I want to simply thank you for hearing me out.

**Here's the truth...**

The Democrats stopped our Red Wave in 2022, and we need every little bit if we want to fund the programs needed to win in 2024 - and we need it today.

I don't have deep-pocketed billionaires I can call on to hit these goals. I rely on a couple of bucks here and there from hard-working Americans receiving these messages when they can afford it.

**If everyone reading this chipped in just a little bit, we would be able to reach our goals and keep up with the Democrats' millions raised. I know it's not much, but all I need from you today is the price of a cup of coffee, a candy bar, or a donut.**

_Democrats are hoping I give up on you.

They're hoping you give up on me.

They're hoping both of us give up on conservative values altogether._
We can't let them run this country into the ground. I'm rolling up my sleeves and continuing to fight for hard-working families like yours - making our country better, stronger, and safer.

_I hope you don't give up on me or our shared values._ A lot of folks are going to ignore this, but I need patriots like you to see what's at stake if you ignore this.

**If you think you're better off than you were 5 years ago, then I understand why you don't want to donate today.**
**But if you think we need to get this country back on track and the American Dream restored, please donate whatever you can afford by midnight!**

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Mandatory U.S. Dollar Recall to Begin on July 26?
body:
If you have any U.S. dollars in your bank account...

| Dear Reader, If you have any U.S. dollars in your bank account... You must see **[this shocking video exposing the government's new plan to recall the U.S. dollar.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbbve7v9pvjgmmftsa1mgbab4cihjrd3h8tccm8o_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli6ap32chh2bs) The official announcement could come as soon as July 26. As _Business Insider_ says, this dollar recall "could be imminent." That means if you don’t prepare now... You could end up holding a bunch of worthless U.S. dollars. **[Click here to see the three simple steps you must take now to protect your life savings.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zq08ubcihl74vs6nedo9f483v26al6st49256sm8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli6ap32chh2bs) Regards, Kendall Castillo
Managing Editor, _Palm Beach Letter_

clean_body: Your response represents every Republican in your state. The most important thing our Party must do is elect a REPUBLICAN to the White House AND elect a REPUBLICAN Majority to the United States Senate, Friend. The chaos and ineptitude of Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and their cronies in the Senate have devastated our once GREAT country. Loyal grassroots supporters like you can be the difference between putting CONSERVATIVES back in charge to restore American greatness or potentially losing the Senate to Chuck Schumer, Adam Schiff and other radical Socialists forever. That's why I'm asking if you will take one of the most important surveys to date: I don't think I can stress to you just how important this is, Friend. We have ALL felt the horrible effects of the Biden-Harris "agenda," and this may be our LAST CHANCE to correct it. ****************************************************************************************************** Senate Republicans asked me to review responses from our top patriots in every state across the country, and YOUR answer via the Presidential Canvass has been selected for review. Please don 't wait too long before I'm forced to move on to the next patriot in your state". Thank you, Kellyanne Conway ****************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Fighting back against Big Tech collusion
body:
The collusion between Big Tech Big Government runs even deeper than we previously knew - and we need your help to put an end to it once for all.

| |
---
| | I need you to read these exchanges, friend.
---
_" Cannot stress the degree to which this needs to be resolved immediately. Please remove this account immediately."_ _ __" We want to make sure YouTube has a handle on vaccine hesitancy and is working toward making the problem better. Noted that vaccine hesitancy was a concern. That is shared by the highest ('and I mean the highest') levels of the White House."_ _ __ "Not to sound like a broken record, but how much content is being demoted, and how effective are you at mitigating reach and how quickly?"_ _ __ "Hey folks, wanted to flag the below tweet and am wondering if we can get moving on the process of having it removed. ASAP"_
---
These are all messages White House officials sent to Big Tech employees that have now come to light because of the _Missouri v. Biden_ case making national headlines - and I needed you to see this with your own eyes. The collusion between Big Tech Big Government runs even deeper than we previously knew - and we need your help to put an end to it once for all. **[Will you give a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today, and help us protect free speech from Big Government?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6c575e8b3e0441f69dcc90f8470ffc68&_e=btCkYA9YNdgoCr2PDxob08HSuD7V7b-E9XdSwJH7R1moVLmv592uDyfwjPqNeVQD5mBN2TW49D8wJkx3WUyKyCuQKzE6HDpThbouEdhh3h1RQ1RxqHhVdjm03Md7_Aq9VOAl-FSdPqAy8YSXoSuVfH-aFOhBoszYy-MjCC_cJ9p-68jP4uxTM0vaA2rMAGaM8v25TBsO7UcXWHWVii6pY-sXVTCK1qZParku5MwVLzWqINuQTyhyt6xFHHmiqGbzLBrWhLOjcNP8C6Yjc0SKYmnR9ZhkCqxtJriYe6yoCMzx99Cnr-MsBfNvdRt4yAMvpAy89XzbC6kPwCkaQYShGctCuV0FsOQ6u4d06QZuTfU%3D)** My name is Harmeet Dhillon and I'm the Founder and CEO of the Center for American Liberty--non-profit law firm dedicated to defending the freedom of speech, civil liberties, and fighting back against government overreach. Thanks to patriotic Americans like you, we're currently suing Twitter and the state of California for their unconstitutional collusion to censor the political speech of political opponents. Rogan O'Handley (known to some by his social media name "DC_Draino") found himself in the crosshairs of this collusion when the State of California leveraged its power to force Twitter to remove Rogan's tweets calling for an audit of the 2020 election. The bad news is that the collusion is even worse than we knew when we filed Rogan's case. **But the good news is that a federal judge recognized these threats to our free speech and enjoined numerous federal agencies from colluding with social media platforms to censor Americans ' speech. ** This is huge. _This federal judge even cited our lawsuit, O 'Handley v. Weber, where we are suing Twitter and the California Secretary of State's office over a factually similar circumstance._ The momentum is on our side, {\var:first_name Friend} -- and we need to take full advantage. **[Will you make a generous, one-time donation of $35 or more right away as we prepare our case for the Supreme Court?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6c575e8b3e0441f69dcc90f8470ffc68&_e=btCkYA9YNdgoCr2PDxob08HSuD7V7b-E9XdSwJH7R1moVLmv592uDyfwjPqNeVQD5mBN2TW49D8wJkx3WUyKyCuQKzE6HDpThbouEdhh3h1RQ1RxqHhVdjm03Md7_Aq9VOAl-FSdPqAy8YSXoSuVfH-aFOhBoszYy-MjCC_cJ9p-68jP4uxTM0vaA2rMAGaM8v25TBsO7UcXWHWVii6pY2l_xwzWmKpHQ1E-7kW2X0uAkNFmACsMf8GDBfeYGUxkehgi2yngHGHBz_dQo1grjyJxNUlFsHc_amMjiRiN23OQ_XcRum_upiT4Sno0ArnB4BIln-srxzoOAuyfGqFC0TACBtkp42tDKtgoJFw3_Jk%3D)** As you may have heard, in Rogan's case we recently filed a petition for certiorari at the Supreme Court of the United States. This is the perfect time for the Court to hear Rogan's case challenging Big Government and Big Tech's collusion to censor conservatives online. And while Judge Doughty's decision is only a preliminary injunction, it's one of the strongest signals we've seen in favor of free speech. This is an incredible step in the right direction, and what I hope will be one of many victories for First Amendment rights.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon
---
Founder & CEO
---
|
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5e7eb8ab4bc64c21a4c8a3ff70cc0e54&_e=OKKmi6kPB51nUSRyvbhpDekGZGa6w35bNqRtkJMNR8TBpX4nO7oyhQcymjRruefR26mbt9A24nTRcMAtcdPmSv4VSK2OK7I-IQTqIckVTaN8u3m407SFLU9L3gYazOqOXQa-BR-Ju2_TsEY5YIxq-nNB-DMBBb05fyTX_b1EB0XuUniJZ6vZHqRA9wn2PdSEluNAc2ATaW_LXnS3vaQBAMhnSo6xQkGPwxM4K1Ln8ggG8bD2oifwiObEqc0S55T9YyYyx7t_gmdJU705il0CnmjNtDffWA5f5QhKLyP8JKco8uhqfn3kcLqc-3aT54wE3XSTMMtXXpfAf1PBlS1N_MoSuIzwuf-cWt4bjLMgk8xIBA00HSBtRLXd_OPJVNsLDYPQv0W1HZh4ZKGig1sk0M5UzqC_jtDXlOJpqFv34zgHC_obxfoj3m_dhcAS1XW3 "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5e7eb8ab4bc64c21a4c8a3ff70cc0e54&_e=OKKmi6kPB51nUSRyvbhpDekGZGa6w35bNqRtkJMNR8TBpX4nO7oyhQcymjRruefR26mbt9A24nTRcMAtcdPmSv4VSK2OK7I-IQTqIckVTaN8u3m407SFLU9L3gYazOqOXQa-BR-Ju2_TsEY5YIxq-nNB-DMBBb05fyTX_b1EB0XuUniJZ6vZHqRA9wn2PdSEluNAc2ATaW_LXnS3vaQBAMhnSo6xQkGPwxM4K1Ln8ggG8bD2oifwiObEqc0S55T9YyYyx7t_gmdJU705il0CnmjNtDffWA5f5QhKLyP8JKevcc2gT4X_W2eipXXM_J3mhG240D2yPLIgLjHixju1PL6HG0doumoCJnRNLaUe6nKVANExVv_Ei8ptiHVPe1iSjT2olKUON27QwxfASa9bEPHlRsKvaddKiGPuGdR09HSopRK-k0XU3G2K8th68x2C "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

name: Governor Ron DeSantis
subject: We are ditching the Republican losing culture
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I will never stop standing up for what I know is right--even when it goes against the grain of public opinion.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=01714d37090d464e917f9a0bcf25672c&_e=xvsfq7POCY-tecYVtxcwUc1RPd2QMWjUNf5epwnTISZIrU8ukBoRXXXnlbhPEXRrJ3HlgziqLx1_Zbp4JK2tCpeGIx5gEes1GOXKg5-GV9DWLVhbgMPKO2Tp_g5DDXoUEnVu68ZrXTJJ2r7LxAmsgjxiiQlaV7j1uVODMz0ONaqSabZuzjIbEeG4VZDoh7afosOIvL1zFAVXGD5Y-oT-dOTFHtmQJDF5bwS8yB2mOap85RB7nhZarpUvWbJgW5cj3-Eh1qDMYqcqeeyqWIVtLzs_kYvryZ3c0RhtFOIQ9VOlYGho-tGFuOwCvgF5Oug4SghQSojQKIXfi5TaQDKYcgoKlXCIQtytkrNjVr9a0riWJIaDj3xozZYLHN2-9zWg0kWeDRwLOaR4iPorddhqFKXJqrZ0HF4jrA7Lyy0eWjc%3D)
---
Friend, **The time for chirping from the sidelines is over.** Talk is ineffective, and that's why my message has been simple: **2024 is the time to put up or shut up**. As a leader, your job is to put the interests of the people you serve above your own political gain. I've done that in Florida, and I've watched the American people cry out for real leadership nationwide. I will never stop standing up for what I know is right--even when it goes against the grain of public opinion. The American people deserve a President with a track record of taking action and standing for what's right. The lack of action from our leaders across this country has gone on for far too long. Joe Biden has done more to damage our nation than anyone, and Kamala Harris has done nothing at all. I am DONE hearing excuses. If Republicans want to ditch the culture of losing, then it's time we try something new. In Florida, I showed the country the playbook for defeating the woke mob:
* Giving parents back their voice in the classroom by BANNING CRT and pornographic content for young kids

* STANDING UP against woke corporations who have tried to force taxpayers to fund an ESG agenda

* DEFEATING Faucism and giving back Floridians the freedom to breathe and see their families after the elites in DC shut down the country

I'm tired of seeing Republicans lose. _A_ _ren 't you, Friend_ _?_ I promise you, with me as your candidate and President, Republicans will forget this culture of losing once and for all. To make sure we're able to achieve this, I am asking for your continued support. **[If you can, will you pitch in?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=01714d37090d464e917f9a0bcf25672c&_e=xvsfq7POCY-tecYVtxcwUc1RPd2QMWjUNf5epwnTISZIrU8ukBoRXXXnlbhPEXRrJ3HlgziqLx1_Zbp4JK2tCpeGIx5gEes1GOXKg5-GV9DWLVhbgMPKO2Tp_g5DDXoUEnVu68ZrXTJJ2r7LxAmsgjxiiQlaV7j1uVODMz0ONaqSabZuzjIbEeG4VZDoh7afosOIvL1zFAVXGD5Y-oT-dOTFHtmQJDF5bwS8yB2mOap85RB7nhZarpUvWbJgW5cj3-Eh1qDMYqcqeeyqWIVtL1IGZA2VLWb7QtSRSF-i6yqkFSLl6dnaK4Tv2Z6_DuzHtrUed9cSGFuca73sY7zPlqfLgOPr8jwRlIn1E2J4whomcQRoPHipVjLNnEQeVgHt7i5znD3u_-v-06nODtRE-GqqEeMgr0Df9itzeSoAKTU%3D "If you can, will you pitch in?")**

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|

body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f9552080e7774e94a69894a610a1764d&_e=St9xiE8QA6KZCllGe7qS_l1HrYiaXlXQiRr1QWx-wn2mrXrO_a_md-epsG5quZu1zx2L3YItELilkttPakj_eZxYfUnEb9QyDS1hTBugOv3wRleDROy7k5ONsQb5ZVtdLOBJtf553hR3I9shI9rRRDE-2UB-kfH6MN4xBzsWfkapgjjTFMEF4SzpzEttr1gDjFzQialwjnQLUUJqSfREb4htLpHbaEzFJIs-V8GsFdsDkCHSST6YIGdr_zz4b7hvulrBOb4RhStC8u04cZVjgZnZRH8SLGCnS9HEvjDzAzGP1vQGoyYMjlHpNz7kQY22) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f9552080e7774e94a69894a610a1764d&_e=St9xiE8QA6KZCllGe7qS_l1HrYiaXlXQiRr1QWx-wn2mrXrO_a_md-epsG5quZu1zx2L3YItELilkttPakj_eZxYfUnEb9QyDS1hTBugOv3wRleDROy7k5ONsQb5ZVtdLOBJtf553hR3I9shI9rRRNnYfL0w_ohkKjQKB4u_LmP-53oaNImZk8IYG--8uUPgR5kkPJ32jbqT3Y84fL7Ndnp-Ie7hM79EOc478vK_UGc7VgjUywgr1X_H0Gm2T-AD0qAGjokeLVBM23KyagMIZKiVaht8xxXe8h8eP0t1gYu_KiYySO0FTzVQa2Kbw41k) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! name: James O'Keefe
subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo00u2tm9olu065ndbc8ahdbecd3pja7a0hj7h9g_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli66o36cdh2bs)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc92ls7uuq2m3mbn8ija4unvdjtmq0gautr8vdgo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli66o36cdh2bs)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**.”

I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3inokhje1trb7bsd6u4a78931ivvv3p4jsv5fb8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli66o36cdh2bs)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkbflidotgc9b4bi18plr40lq9rsfheadd0aq14g_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli66o36cdh2bs)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That’s where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zorv46kubjfn0lcgj0qn5hs3lmnbftvpa7ap2g50_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli66o36cdh2bs)?**

When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

**[I’m asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z84dk7o7s5sv8qilv5sk9f6strekbarngvd58qgo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli66o36cdh2bs)**. And I’ll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z86q8mjudmjhjeqsavjc2l1iek6d294315136pd8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli66o36cdh2bs)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O’Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp5t9t90c14cf642c4fccfc1t918jkmt7ek7gemo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli66o36cdh2bs)**.

---

GOP Presidential
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb2fq86mih2jgssrr3gdkr3k5m6m09upnictdjd0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp34cpjm2pb5c8gq48bi4bh28or0sjim8or0cphm49fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztsrq1pcmqrk8d9jvsnk5r94icl50g81re28t2to_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli66o36cdh2bs)_

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Jacky Rosen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Three things to know about Jacky Rosen’s Senate race: | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66570897/416818438/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ15K_TAN_E_20230716_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjNkYjQ4Yy1lMTIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mPIrajRFh8IftthqkzHwEAn8jTsgaSNKabxbYxaSUAs=&emci=a53db48c-e123-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=b63db48c-e123-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
My friend and colleague Senator Jacky Rosen (D-Nevada) is up for re-election next year. Here are three things to know about her race:
* Nevada had the nation’s closest Senate election in 2022.
* A recent poll showed Jacky Rosen two points down.
* Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate — an anti-abortion rights extremist — just launched his campaign against her.

[**This is a powerfully important moment to show that we’re in this fight alongside Jacky Rosen. Can you split a donation of $20 — or whatever makes sense for you — between Jacky Rosen and our re-election campaign right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66570901/416818442/1789514515?amount=20&refcode=EMZ15K_TAN_E_20230716_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjNkYjQ4Yy1lMTIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mPIrajRFh8IftthqkzHwEAn8jTsgaSNKabxbYxaSUAs=) Look: if Democrats lose this race, it’s going to be really, really tough to hold onto our Senate majority. And the GOP came within 10,000 votes — less than one percentage point — of winning Nevada’s Senate election last year. We must protect our Democratic majority, and we’ve got to keep Jacky Rosen in the Senate, where she fights from the heart for working families. When I first met her, I knew she was a fighter. She hasn’t had anything handed to her. She worked as a cocktail waitress to help put herself through college, and when she started as a computer programmer, she worked as a banquet waitress on the side to pay the bills. Now she’s a force to be reckoned with in Washington — fighting for affordable health care, protections for Nevada’s beautiful natural environment (a place Bruce and I love to go hiking), and the right to an abortion. Just one recent example: We teamed up and called on the Department of Veterans Affairs to start offering abortion care — and then they began offering abortion services. **Let’s keep Jacky Rosen in the fight. Let’s win this battleground race. And let’s keep Republicans far, far, far away from a Senate majority, which they could use to ban abortion nationwide, slash Social Security and Medicare, and hand more tax breaks to billionaires and billionaire corporations.** [**If you can, please split a contribution between Jacky Rosen and me today. Any amount makes a real difference.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66570906/416818517/1789514515?refcode=EMZ15K_TAN_E_20230716_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjNkYjQ4Yy1lMTIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mPIrajRFh8IftthqkzHwEAn8jTsgaSNKabxbYxaSUAs=) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | [**DONATE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66570913/416818541/1789514515?refcode=EMZ15K_TAN_E_20230716_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjNkYjQ4Yy1lMTIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mPIrajRFh8IftthqkzHwEAn8jTsgaSNKabxbYxaSUAs=)
