name: 1600 Daily
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
You probably haven't seen one of these - YET.

| Dear Reader, You probably haven't seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgd09lfm1mtjtul1c7qn9ts0tcou3sb1nt2v8e70_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli66p76chh2bs) If you've been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you've almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'. According to the _New York Post_ , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv2dnphprgo85ivt2n0g5lutdhu61g3c7l13evj8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli66p76chh2bs) They've been installed at places like Citizen's Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They've even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There's nobody in America who's more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange 'reverse ATMs.' And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation's financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what's to come. BUT, folks who understand the 'Reverse ATM' phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says:
> "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short."
To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. [Click here now to see Dr. Prins' free presentation.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zihv53kke4g8p4u0njk6dvse7oaebk7gbpeoq7q8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli66p76chh2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. [Click here to see how.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7u3jh7tjv96j9bals8kvsliniqe8v4d4ldb1cj0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli66p76chh2bs)

In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange 'reverse ATMs.' And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation's financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what's to come. BUT, folks who understand the 'Reverse ATM' phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says: "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short." To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. Regards, Maria Bonaventura Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics P.S. The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. 1600 Daily 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zecrpfdl17n1vphr4eakrb2b8r5u4jmg3hpd4b7o_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli66p76cjh2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0pm7dff3rskf8l3aaen8g5k83hbgovpjjg0nitg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli66p76cjh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkp79tl9kf0k9hul1jp57p89nbeulf5ll5fqbrt0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli66p76cjh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhu37esvns06fhj45b1cppgo5rbneo5sq1qgoa58_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli66p76cjh2bs)

name: Kash Patel
subject: The most personal email I’ll ever send you
body:
I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgkvejpas11sgsrdjb2a042hm780cq3ltci1rloo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli6eo74cth2bs)

Hello Friend,

I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

I have always loved my country.

That's why I've dedicated my life to being a public defender, a federal prosecutor, and a legal liaison to the United States Armed Forces. I believe in the foundational values of America - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

So when Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, _good or bad_ , it had to be published.

When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. **But this investigation changed my life forever ...**

_Trump did NOT collude with Russia_.

**My investigation discovered the FBI 's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it _intentionall_ y to get rid of President Trump.**

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are crooks who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

Once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help American patriots by offering financial assistance to whistleblowers, veterans, patriots, and some families of Jan 6 detainees.

As a former federal prosecutor, I know that we need protection if we are going to expose corrupt government gangsters.

I set a goal to raise **$45,000** by the end of the week, and we're behind in reaching that goal.

[As a personal favor, will you donate $10, $35, $50, or any amount to support these freedom fighters? Click here to rush your support before the deadline >>>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zofsmoah6r6nq4fi1mlpkies5i7osa2ivaviqmmo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli6eo74cth2bs)

Conservatives, America-First patriots, or anyone who believes that Americans are **innocent** until proven guilty must join together in this fight.

Some of the Jan 6 detainees have become victims of the abuses outlined above, and we cannot leave them in solitary confinement within the D.C. prison system.

**This two-tiered justice system is a complete sham and a mockery of our constitution.**

Due process has been destroyed.

**We cannot let the justice system be hijacked and used against us. **

[I am humbly asking for your support. Join me in the fight for justice in defending patriots against abuse of the justice system by clicking here >>>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf3t0vlrqqokfnkumhv06llmj9h2bktujrfqeq18_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli6eo74cth2bs)

Trump and the Jan 6 defendants are only the beginning. The radical left has weaponized the justice system against America-first patriots.

Whether you're a whistleblower exposing deep state corruption, a parent protesting against trans ideology in our schools, or a pro-life activist praying outside of abortion clinics, the justice system can be used against you. We need an organization to defend our supporters, and that's what Kash Foundation is doing.

**Will you help me reach my goal by donating today? Please click any link below.**

[Donate $10 >>>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqu11vkttr3idf067ght9pqco78iavbnqqlks620_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli6eo74cth2bs)

[Donate $50 >>>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6ae970r93f6g47s33o9hfuae8tcecs30s1qc4b0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli6eo74cth2bs)

[Donate $100 >>>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6blm3mr9186setbc0fha2rca7unjafdq1tpj3d8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli6eo74cth2bs)

[Donate $250 >>>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z67l5bgosgnb2vc7ld2hfv8d04qde89ja4crb3l8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli6eo74cth2bs)

[Donate $500 >>>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc9i5fkea8qt3blg6go4c4qpq9qrrf59idvttm3o_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli6eo74cth2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsjr9qutice3sed7cbtgr2sa50bjab289lkgcp88_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli6eo74cth2bs)

[Donate $2,500 >>>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zp205drncn3qfamtq1rg2ose659bbq0s8osatb5g_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli6eo74cth2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4t893dih6huit5k8pko0n39g6jli4uvvipt7cb8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sli6eo74cth2bs)

Thank you,

Kash Patel

**P.S. The radical left cannot destroy our reputations with the media like they used to. Now, they are assisted by the two-tier justice system. A legal foundation is needed to help America-first patriots with these struggles.**

body:
We must protect the sanctity of our elections.

| |
---
| | | The Liberal Machine is already attacking voter ID laws and collaborating with Big Tech to censor Conservatives. They're even passing laws allowing ILLEGAL immigrants to vote in U.S. elections.

This is unacceptable. We must protect the integrity of our elections. We must restore faith in the process. **That 's why House Republicans are working overtime to clean things up.**

_Just to name a few ..._
\-- Photo ID Laws
\-- Reasonable protections making it harder to cheat
\-- Keeping non-citizens out of the ballot box
We are determined to secure our elections. Will you join us?
---

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=907ed54a8a5b40dfb41931725048196a&_e=lMfUcenkhmAobTS57sID3hy8zzfPjgpmVh0IzkHFWrcH2tnfrP85UsrwFn_OLxH-fgfDTtYFWXgvZSOksQTbwFReIxJQ8jVaZJlgVdf0nuFE5hsBigKbLffdAf6Iapa0kAEwkzpwxOadZTeHZE43DDapmPXMQwLJqCYEIYfKzXPHeM1TEs36xCe98dLGu4P-iG_min5jNRJd49s2O6V63cipbh3Pzr5ZiNDhez1Xn5mrvWniTj_PdgDhcLVD4vh7byzUg2PCP_n822OHdjQldA%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=907ed54a8a5b40dfb41931725048196a&_e=lMfUcenkhmAobTS57sID3hy8zzfPjgpmVh0IzkHFWrcH2tnfrP85UsrwFn_OLxH-fgfDTtYFWXgvZSOksQTbwFReIxJQ8jVaZJlgVdf0nuFE5hsBigKbLffdAf6Iapa0Ij4taN-KLkwgiO5cGruHPdt0WmZu-lEFQY3D4UhfbrZct3XE0qz7B2NueK5rR87zaf6satvN75xMSr5zUTeFJQAUbX6sh8zKKPKFIsaNxfwM-GCAswgFQ-lK1r6KM2nzoCIMME9xpewzXPNCly5vXg%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=907ed54a8a5b40dfb41931725048196a&_e=lMfUcenkhmAobTS57sID3hy8zzfPjgpmVh0IzkHFWrcH2tnfrP85UsrwFn_OLxH-fgfDTtYFWXgvZSOksQTbwFReIxJQ8jVaZJlgVdf0nuFE5hsBigKbLffdAf6Iapa0vLd0UIpSw66Q5hacPx_ZI3hrnplExalKBEPeQ9HST0yLBC9IgJfLDmub7yPeYbFouMZYLCkft-3KmR0Kh3SLqG658OyiT9eU0XxET_fHABl0Ey4Yk2hEUVW0WjK8pEnl3UsiagxZArcaZ-w2Zok0FQ%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com

Goal: **1,000 Donors

name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: Crime Rates in WA
body:
The Executive Director of the Washington Association of Sheriffs and Police Chiefs (WASPC), Steven Strachan, joined us for this week's Newsmaker Interview. He discussed the annual Crime in Washington report released by WASPC, which revealed that while violent crime rates are decreasing nationwide, they are rising in Washington State | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62030501:W1DxvtD8N:m:1:2610672541:B56F4752285AE0F12761DF9FDD3C2036:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends, We here at Shift WA are back from our summer break! And, as always, we have you covered on what's going on in your own backyard. Read on... _** **_ _**This week 's Newsmaker Interview...**_ The Executive Director of the Washington Association of Sheriffs and Police Chiefs (WASPC), Steven Strachan, joined us for this week's Newsmaker Interview. He discussed the annual Crime in Washington report released by WASPC, which revealed that while violent crime rates are decreasing nationwide, they are rising in Washington State. The report also highlighted that Washington ranks last among all states and the District of Columbia in terms of police officers per resident. The data showed that people of color have been disproportionately affected by the increase in crime and the decrease in police officers. In his interview, Strachan emphasized the importance of lawmakers considering these concerning trends when developing future public safety proposals, discussed strategies to recruit more police officers, addressed the legislature's recent "fix" of the Blake decision regarding drug possession laws, and outlined the remaining challenges in improving law enforcement's ability to pursue suspected criminals. [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62030502:W1DxvtD8N:m:1:2610672541:B56F4752285AE0F12761DF9FDD3C2036:r)**.** ** ** _**This week 's top story...**_ Governor Jay Inslee and Democrat lawmakers claimed that their Cap and Trade legislation, commonly referred to as a "carbon tax," would only have a minimal impact on consumers, despite evidence suggesting otherwise. However, after six months of implementation, the program has caused gas prices in Washington to rise by 45 cents per gallon, resulting in the state having the highest gas prices in the country. Senator Chris Gildon, a Republican, wrote a letter to the Inslee Administration, urging them to make administrative changes to alleviate the burden on lower and middle-income workers affected by the policy. [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62030503:W1DxvtD8N:m:1:2610672541:B56F4752285AE0F12761DF9FDD3C2036:r)**.** _**In case you missed it ...**_ Susanna Keilman, a Korean American with a background in the military and medical research who previously ran for state representative in the 28th Legislative District in 2022, recently organized an important vigil and march. The vigil was held in Seattle to honor Eina Kwon and her unborn child, who were tragically killed in a random murder. The rally was a response to growing anger and frustration within the Asian and Pacific Island community, as well as the wider region, over liberal policies that have contributed to crime, drug issues, homelessness, and mental health problems, making Seattle unsafe. Keilman recently joined us for an interview to explain the event and the frustrations. [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62030504:W1DxvtD8N:m:1:2610672541:B56F4752285AE0F12761DF9FDD3C2036:r)**.** _**This week 's bit of inspiration...**_ Take a moment to enjoy the beautiful photography of Palouse Fields, courtesy of former U.S. Congressman Rod Chandler. | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62030505:W1DxvtD8N:m:1:2610672541:B56F4752285AE0F12761DF9FDD3C2036:r)

He discussed the annual Crime in Washington report released by WASPC, which revealed that while violent crime rates are decreasing nationwide, they are rising in Washington State | | "Shift Washington" | Friends, We here at Shift WA are back from our summer break! And, as always, we have you covered on what's going on in your own backyard. Read on... This week 's Newsmaker Interview... The Executive Director of the Washington Association of Sheriffs and Police Chiefs (WASPC), Steven Strachan, joined us for this week's Newsmaker Interview. He discussed the annual Crime in Washington report released by WASPC, which revealed that while violent crime rates are decreasing nationwide, they are rising in Washington State. The report also highlighted that Washington ranks last among all states and the District of Columbia in terms of police officers per resident. The data showed that people of color have been disproportionately affected by the increase in crime and the decrease in police officers. In his interview, Strachan emphasized the importance of lawmakers considering these concerning trends when developing future public safety proposals, discussed strategies to recruit more police officers, addressed the legislature's recent "fix" of the Blake decision regarding drug possession laws, and outlined the remaining challenges in improving law enforcement's ability to pursue suspected criminals. . This week 's top story... Governor Jay Inslee and Democrat lawmakers claimed that their Cap and Trade legislation, commonly referred to as a "carbon tax," would only have a minimal impact on consumers, despite evidence suggesting otherwise. However, after six months of implementation, the program has caused gas prices in Washington to rise by 45 cents per gallon, resulting in the state having the highest gas prices in the country. Senator Chris Gildon, a Republican, wrote a letter to the Inslee Administration, urging them to make administrative changes to alleviate the burden on lower and middle-income workers affected by the policy. . body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1878825?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | _**3... 2... 1... and...**_ **HIGH-PRESSURE WATER BLASTS DOWNWARD! The Earth CRACKS. Steam SHOOTS out of the ground. A nasty CHEMICAL COCKTAIL injected into our precious public lands.** Right now, greedy corporations are fracking in critical wildlife habitats, decimating beautiful scenery, and polluting nearby communities – **all so that a few money-hungry CEOs can line their pockets**. And guess what, Friend: **the Department of Interior is about to lease EVEN MORE land for fracking by corporate polluters**. [**_Please, Friend, send your message to the DOI by 11:59pm TONIGHT! We need 2,398 more signatures to help STOP new fracking on public lands before it’s too late!_**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1878826?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1878827?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Fracking POISONS air, water, and land with pollution. People exposed to fracking or oil drilling can suffer from _**coughing fits, dizziness, nausea, and SPLITTING headaches**_. To make matters worse, fracking wastewater can even contaminate community drinking water with **RADIOACTIVE material**.
The Department of Interior is poised to turn over even more public lands to greedy corporations, sacrificing public lands and people’s health to boost industry’s bottom line. **You can help PROTECT public lands, people, and wildlife from corporate greed.[_Tell the DOI: no more FRACKING on public lands and CANCEL the upcoming lease sale!_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1878828?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**

---
**Standing with you,
Nicole Ghio,
Fossil Fuels Program Manager,
Friends of the Earth**

**FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ** Dear Fellow American, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism - mostly the latter - and just how important and rare it is to get things right. In today's media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. **The New York Sun is different. It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.** Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point. When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments. The Sun's deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate. It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism. I've been impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join. **The Sun's success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. **[I highly encourage you to join the Sun today. ](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTk3LWU1MGMyMjQ4OTgyMzQyMGM5ZGNjZDRiMDFiZDNmZGJkIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZ25zb2Z5Y2NxaD9zcmM9TExPNDA5OTMifQ/hH8GXr62CO9rSeMVQeDKtw)**
---
[**Join the Sun Now →**](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTk3LWU1MGMyMjQ4OTgyMzQyMGM5ZGNjZDRiMDFiZDNmZGJkIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZ25zb2Z5Y2NxaD9zcmM9TExPNDA5OTMifQ/K_kWLXEtqCIb02lKUAa9tw)
---
Every person matters in this effort. Don't wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---
---
**Alan Dershowitz** Columnist, The New York Sun

name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: Celebrating Recent Redistricting Victories.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

Team,
The victories our movement has achieved in recent months, in cases like _Allen v. Milligan_ and _Moore v. Harper_ , are not just singular triumphs. They are rallying cries for justice, echoes of a resolute and unwavering commitment to fairness, equality and equal representation. The victories were made possible because we refused to stand idly by and let our democracy be trampled upon. And while these were momentous wins, our work remains unfinished.
[**Will you make a donation to All On The Line to help us keep up the momentum?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66560591/416787970/-1915986207?refcode=20230716_AOTL_P_EHHA1_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkzODRkYTU5LWQwMjMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YqxMrPTUcwq_u1nj1zhsGpesEu_pbgH-qBM5Vb-h8zM=)

We are here, now, at a critical juncture in our history, where the fight for fair maps and voting rights has never been more crucial. It is a battle that transcends political affiliations and unites us as champions of democracy. Together, we can dismantle the walls of division, shatter the chains of oppression, and create a future where every American's voice is heard, regardless of their race, their background, or their ZIP code.
[**But we cannot do this alone. We need your support and belief that a fair and inclusive democracy is not just a lofty ideal, but a fundamental right. By making a donation to All On The Line, you become an architect of change, a guardian of democracy, and a force that cannot be silenced. And while these were momentous wins, our work remains unfinished. = = We are here, now, at a critical juncture in our history, where the fight for fair maps and voting rights has never been more crucial. It is a battle that transcends political affiliations and unites us as champions of democracy. Together, we can dismantle the walls of division, shatter the chains of oppression, and create a future where every American's voice is heard, regardless of their race, their background, or their ZIP code. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Imagine a nation where the power rests not in the hands of the few, but in the collective will of the people. Picture a future where every voice matters, where communities are no longer marginalized, and where the promise of democracy is fulfilled. We have the opportunity to shape this future, to forge a path that generations will look back upon with gratitude and admiration. = Together we have achieved so much, but the road ahead is filled with obstacles and challenges and we must remain steadfast. subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I'm at my wits' end

|
---
| | |
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?
---

You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
The two combined... it's not great
#

Peter -
Alright, this isn't easy. But here it goes...
We came up short of our mid-month fundraising goals for July. No lie. In full transparency, we missed by more than 1,000 donations.
Making matters worse, Kyrsten Sinema just filed an FEC report FILLED with max-out and double max-out donations. Those are the big checks written by hedge fund managers and the people she protects when voting against working folks.
The two combined... it's not great.
But the good news is, when a campaign is funded by mostly grassroots donations, we can catch up QUICK.
$5 or $10 may not be nearly as much as the average Sinema donor, but it all adds up fast when we're all chipping-in.
So we've extended our mid-month fundraising deadline by just one day, and are counting on you to help us reach our goals. Please:

name: Jahana Hayes
subject: Ending an era of bipartisanship…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
The extreme GOP forwent over 300 years of bipartisan agreement | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66561740/416791587/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTA5ODdmMS1kNTIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2WjqqNYUvkdEh3hYVAhmPtOoTKKshmeKAYKE_95la0o=&emci=dea8cc37-4023-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=390987f1-d523-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=15529135) | The National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA) is an annual piece of legislation that dictates U.S. policy on defense and the men and women that serve in the military. On Friday, the House narrowly passed a controversial version of this bill that would cut off access to abortion care for military service members, slash funding for diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) efforts, block actions to address climate change, and endanger LGBTQ+ service members. Even four Republicans voted against this bill because it is far too extreme – and goes against over 300 years of bipartisan work to fund and support our military and service members. Instead of focusing on improving outcomes for our service members and prioritizing national defense imperatives, the GOP has prioritized culture war issues that take away rights and access to healthcare for our service members. Speaker McCarthy allowed the furthest fringes of his party to fill this bill, which is typically a bipartisan agreement to set Pentagon policy and spending, with extremist agenda items. Friends, this is the outcome of allowing the furthest extremes of a party to take the lead. We are fighting over abortion rather than investing in keeping our country safe. clean_body: The extreme GOP forwent over 300 years of bipartisan agreement | | The National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA) is an annual piece of legislation that dictates U.S. policy on defense and the men and women that serve in the military. On Friday, the House narrowly passed a controversial version of this bill that would cut off access to abortion care for military service members, slash funding for diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) efforts, block actions to address climate change, and endanger LGBTQ+ service members. Even four Republicans voted against this bill because it is far too extreme – and goes against over 300 years of bipartisan work to fund and support our military and service members. Instead of focusing on improving outcomes for our service members and prioritizing national defense imperatives, the GOP has prioritized culture war issues that take away rights and access to healthcare for our service members. Speaker McCarthy allowed the furthest fringes of his party to fill this bill, which is typically a bipartisan agreement to set Pentagon policy and spending, with extremist agenda items. Friends, this is the outcome of allowing the furthest extremes of a party to take the lead. We are fighting over abortion rather than investing in keeping our country safe. This needs to end, and we need to take back the House in 2024. = We need to put an end to extremism in the House and get back to work serving our military, investing in our future, and fighting for hardworking families across the country. Thank you for standing with me, Jahana Hayes * Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. clean_body: Winning the White House isn’t enough...| | | Friend, to truly SAVE AMERICA, it’s not enough to just win back the White House. We also need a Republican Senate majority full of America First fighters we can trust. Otherwise, we’ll have only won half the battle – something we can’t afford when the Left is on the precipice of turning our country into a Third World Marxist dictatorship. Soros and the corrupt globalist establishment are already shelling out MILLIONS to influence key Senate races so they can maintain a foothold in Washington even if Biden loses.... ...one that they can use to silence your voice by coming after your next President. Just imagine the kind of sick, twisted schemes and witch hunts they’d concoct to sabotage our agenda and maintain their grip on power! That’s why I’m asking for your help building an America First Senate majority to ensure there’s NOTHING the Left can do to stop us from SAVING AMERICA on January 20th, 2025! | | We’re going to have a lot of work to do when we win back the White House... 2024 truly is the FINAL BATTLE to save America, Friend. With patriots like YOU fighting alongside us, we WILL prevail. But our victory in that battle must be total and complete. Thank you, Donald J. name: Andy Kim
subject: This kind of extremist, partisan bottleneck is unacceptable.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
Right now, the reputation, readiness, and operational capacity of the United States Marine Corps are at risk for the first time in over one hundred years.

The Guardian: US Marines without leader for first time in 150 as Republican blocks nomination[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-07-16-marine-corps&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=52c76954-d823-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73]

I am deeply disappointed to see Republican partisanship again take precedence over elected leaders' responsibility to our country.

By obstructing the orderly transition of power and blocking over 200 military personnel appointments, Republicans are jeopardizing our national security and the safety of our servicemembers and their families.

This blatant partisanship has no place in national security, and it's keeping our military from operating at full capacity.

Our servicemembers deserve to have a steady hand at the wheel. This kind of extremist, partisan bottleneck is unacceptable. Servicemembers are not political pawns.

I will always put the well-being of our servicemembers and their families first, and our servicemembers and military families deserve a Congress that will do the same.

More soon,

Andy

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: DLCC Newsletter
subject: State Republicans ban abortion while Democrats work to expand reproductive rights … and everything else you need to know in the states
body:
Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, July 16th, 2023 | | |
---
| | | [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0qGpwpXgoJxt9wxxr6-3NGZy8uzjP7lQns4eM7mQr18nbBTscuYL22isIY29FSQLcV6mr91eEUVyemsu9wrmEdKWQfZXhzjJsJJss3eapS7QJ_6ztJUZZUGh2gPWbCZEo0cJTYZQ6brOahW2hMUCCjUrXuJDuq-2uBSGta6ZEhpijzIzW5Ms3k3tlDETpm_OxqVFhPzPt3XWesuaTAzTOn9fz1tm_tIfK5p8ks-IIy5WlC7NPQKT1n2o8T1PbEUGGkVE8vs2rPi78RA7Gqm7puV2vn9Y_VjUPkm7AqaHwL31ffLLvrAs1rmfR0OLI1z-K1V-gP0RocfUeGwNcwM5xvtEN7qAmzdB_8g71lVRM8lmdbhGXHYOGcU5877ta1ri72Mb1XrhygrvYooitT1qSpBildOsIvDmbhqwNhDpyT9AVvNLix0XlqrVeBfg9X5SW_8xhoKldawOoQsYIVH7UtWFHOluqGRiqeiPp8lijXm1p60T8VIP4axGy7bPOlEulQ/3xx/uM_4MNTZRGuoRBL3a6Yr0w/h0/bvh-CrNnXJ0NZWWBo_0X8vtgA3VGdEtJK06HvA6go-A)
---
1️⃣ **_Iowa:_ Republicans pass a six-week abortion ban**
In Iowa, Republicans voted to ban most abortions at six weeks of pregnancy – before many women know they’re pregnant. [**The bill now heads to GOP Gov. subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ziqqig6kuvfec19uf8p1k54atap6mti01eckr1do_rp22sh2s8i66o74slh6epr6chh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3qjlsl423di8tn1dm587mm7hh5evbg9l2pbk6v0_rp22sh2s8i66o74slh6epr6chh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zejek88mk8no5ank98gcob6s27c3essp05bl6dv0_rp22sh2s8i66o74slh6epr6chh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

Goal: **1,000 Donors

[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z17e7lqphja8007s5s96ie9b7obla0b570jtg6jg_rp22sh2s8i66o74slh6epr6chh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7hg3nif8qlra63mn874t51beu2pn1hv6rh2pa0g_rp22sh2s8i66o74slh6epr6chh2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9rj3gq2jpru3pt4h6c1uink3qapemjm815vm7g8_rp22sh2s8i66o74slh6epr6chh2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj4p4cubtlue3un81d4ep0jbfos357m3uoted0bg_rp22sh2s8i66o74slh6epr6chh2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

clean_body: | = | | Hi Peter, my name is Joseph Signorello (but please, just call me Joe). I’m the son of Italian immigrants and a self-made New Jerseyan who won my hometown’s mayoral race by flipping Roselle Park from Republican to Democrat in 2018. And I pride myself on cutting through the nonsense to tell it like it is, so here it goes: Today, I’m officially launching my campaign for the U.S. House to flip New Jersey’s 7th District and help Democrats re-take the House majority in 2024. = | | | = | | = New Jersey’s 7th District will be one of the most competitive House races of 2024, Peter. Republicans flipped this seat red by just 8,000 votes last cycle, helping Kevin McCarthy and the rest of the GOP take over the House majority. But Democrats can win here. In fact, President Biden carried the redistricted NJ-07 by nearly FOUR points in 2020! Now, I won’t lie to you and tell you this is going to be easy, Peter. Kevin McCarthy and national Republicans from all across the country are targeting this seat with pinpoint precision in 2024. They’re planning to spend millions to prop up my GOP opponent and keep House control. That’s why I’m asking for your early support. If NJ-07 is going to elect a leader committed to protecting Medicare and Social Security, defending our fundamental right to vote, and safeguarding democracy from far-right extremists, then we need to fight back ASAP. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = We really appreciate your support, Joe Signorello = | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. body:
Tell It Like It Is PAC Releases New TV Ad: “Trump's Choice” | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f1a5d070c67c/what-they-are-saying-about-chris-christie-13559776?e=d0a9afa930)

**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:** July 16, 2023
Contact: [press@tellitlikeitispac.com](mailto:press@tellitlikeitispac.com)
**Tell It Like It Is PAC Releases New TV Ad: “Trump’s Choice”
** _The Ad Frames Trump As Either A “Chicken” Or A “Loser” No Matter What He Decide_ s
**ARLINGTON, VA —** Today, Tell It Like It Is PAC released a new television advertisement challenging Donald Trump to attend the upcoming GOP presidential debate in Milwaukee this August. Entitled “Trump’s Choice,” the :60 second spot will air on cable and across digital platforms. The spot, which includes footage of a 2004 SNL skit of Trump dancing alongside chickens, comes on the heels of Governor Chris Christie announcing that he surpassed the required 40,000 donor threshold set by the Republican National Committee (RNC). Since launching his presidential run, Governor Christie has been adamant that Republican primary voters deserve a chance to hear all of the candidates on the debate stage. Donald Trump however, thinks differently and has threatened to skip the first two debates.
**“Trump’s Choice”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=7ffa4092d6&e=d0a9afa930)
**TRANSCRIPT - “TRUMP’S CHOICE” (:60)**
VO: _We know what’s in your head, Donald._
_Now that Chris Christie has qualified, should you show up to the debate?_
_Because if you do – your opponents will bring up the impeachments, the indictments._
_Bring up how you lost to Joe Biden, lost the House, lost the Senate._
_They will remind everyone you didn’t build that big, beautiful wall, and not one peso from Mexico._
_That instead of balancing the budget – you increased it by six trillion._
_That you never repealed Obamacare._
_Because that’s what they’ll say if you show up, especially that guy Christie._
_But if you don’t go - you’ll be called a coward, a chicken._
_Reduced to throwing spitballs from the sidelines._
_So, Donald, you need to decide, are you a chicken or just a loser?_
_Tell It Like It Is PAC is responsible for the content of this advertisement._

| [DONATE](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=0f01a98bb1&e=d0a9afa930)

The more we rise, the more they attack.

| | | [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e4fcad63bfc44c33b1db536bf6b3d86c&_e=XweG6_p3fkdYIv41UMzGQnyu9KixK2rA-qmwJpt2dHbXaOG01aPmby_qlo7rwHr-F4Dq4z88NPPLW8p9ebk1YD2XAo1RTGK0LP_TeUb2tVeMUOByPozJr8ZhVvA_frsU6QQm4KPd4mp1YF6Ze_HfwI-NPEY_SapK3gu569nIQJb3X7DWLflnwFMpESe_F7wStvUAqaFqbu2ocI-Yk8qRaR8quyZbbG3FSJR2HBS-ACHoSZrIs7OTyHZ5g_tumztPahIhJRqdebkqesaL9FiirNHR_iGF5T2MOO4L8tqw6U-fQAzOGZwOUC1MTJiLa7Z9lrnx4Oy3IK0nBQr-q5suTEE3p5wHh5S8xwV8EgxZCcZcpZz_qnLc-1xkCWaGyoBRx-EG7HmkJkr2iBpvQEpf1g%3D%3D)

Friend,
Because we keep rising and rising in the polls, the disloyal Republicans - who are out to stop us in the primary - just added another $70 MILLION in pledges to their sinister plot to destroy us.
That brings their pledged grand total to **$370 MILLION.**
Why aren't they pledging to spend that money to beat Crooked Joe instead?
Because these two-faced, back-stabbing RINOs would rather have four more years of Biden and Kamala than someone who actually fights for the Silent Majority.
**_These RINOs want a Republican nominee who will appease the Deep State and let the new tyrannical status quo continue._**
**_Appeasement is not possible when our liberty and justice are being ripped from right under us._**
These cowards just watched the federal government INDICT and ARRAIGN me as an innocent man - and yet, their response is to drop to their knees and beg the Deep State for mercy...
_... To spend hundreds of millions of dollars to push us even closer to tyranny._
But I have a GREAT idea to counter this latest $70 MILLION pledge...
As you know, our movement has over 74 MILLION voters. With just $1 from each of us, we'd OUTRAISE these traitors within the snap of a finger.
But - it only works if we all do it!
That's why I'm asking you to give whatever you can - even if that's $1, there are so many of us, that it all adds up FAST - to counter this $370 million RINO plot to stop us.

clean_body: The more we rise, the more they attack. | | | Friend, Because we keep rising and rising in the polls, the disloyal Republicans - who are out to stop us in the primary - just added another $70 MILLION in pledges to their sinister plot to destroy us. That brings their pledged grand total to $370 MILLION. Why aren't they pledging to spend that money to beat Crooked Joe instead? Because these two-faced, back-stabbing RINOs would rather have four more years of Biden and Kamala than someone who actually fights for the Silent Majority. These RINOs want a Republican nominee who will appease the Deep State and let the new tyrannical status quo continue. Appeasement is not possible when our liberty and justice are being ripped from right under us. These cowards just watched the federal government INDICT and ARRAIGN me as an innocent man - and yet, their response is to drop to their knees and beg the Deep State for mercy... ... To spend hundreds of millions of dollars to push us even closer to tyranny. But I have a GREAT idea to counter this latest $70 MILLION pledge... As you know, our movement has over 74 MILLION voters. With just $1 from each of us, we'd OUTRAISE these traitors within the snap of a finger. But - it only works if we all do it! That's why I'm asking you to give whatever you can - even if that's $1, there are so many of us, that it all adds up FAST - to counter this $370 million RINO plot to stop us. | Thank you, | Donald J. name: Jim Justice
subject: Trump-hating group raises $13.5 million to defeat me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Justice for Senate
body:
The anti-Trump group, Club for Growth, just announced they raised over $13 million for my Republican primary opponent. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=2c33611d657540aeb5304ce0a71180ff&_t=8Jm-hTbZ4-BuxLtX5YmEglRcekUGdp51Otb8eqtGWvRhhJt18Z6Xw63KduCuq_pDSCWJzRiJPje67Unw1zG0BUhmLabijrJ2C6QAWlWfSGo%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=2c33611d657540aeb5304ce0a71180ff&_t=8Jm-hTbZ4-BuxLtX5YmEglRcekUGdp51Otb8eqtGWvRhhJt18Z6Xw63KduCuq_pDSCWJzRiJPje67Unw1zG0BUhmLabijrJ2C6QAWlWfSGo%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2c33611d657540aeb5304ce0a71180ff&_e=epJ12vqb9JAcibzXBNQpQQToKV3uyQo6dN90NuGoHW7rhBa6kT79KAGPIzgCGjizrbCTdErt0eEgGs_yWsniEf9w2ueSzaPNoF1u_cSagYzLvde9HpOYWDZk03z7wAUj-bgLyV9GJPGsifyjH5VZxty9_Rs7L6tkgXb81LyQjly6A13YXufSS-yDQnZ2bdC7b3EuaFJdBNTy0-LpvalgvdwyS4YttQ5KFy991MR17bmzK5_BH92SIjNRNKX0KuCuHoOAeshAjGhNfxLCwNHPHMwPknnwlSDYbbhnJMoHHmJElOjPc3O-qXDdQr_F2QCnljAw9-dLWgT1lovKqG5MWFkLAoFByt0jQ0ucvPXaZCOBUZW87E1qTKG-9t1A5xfi3FBnL0yjQ_miZAh9u05p_A%3D%3D)

---

Fellow Conservative:

The Trump-hating political action group, **the Club for Growth** , announced on Wednesday that they raised $3 million more than they originally pledged - to defeat me and boost my anti-Trump primary opponent.

**I can’t tell you how bad this is for our chances of winning back the Senate.** This group hates former President Donald Trump and has a long history of backing losing candidates in primary fights, preventing us from winning a Republican majority in the U.S. Senate.

**Instead of backing strong candidates who can win in tough contests, like me, they spend MILLIONS backing candidates who are more concerned about scoring political points.**

Fellow Conservative, if you’re interested in ensuring our party puts up conservative candidates who can WIN competitive contests,**[I need you to signal your support for my campaign right now.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2c33611d657540aeb5304ce0a71180ff&_e=epJ12vqb9JAcibzXBNQpQQToKV3uyQo6dN90NuGoHW7rhBa6kT79KAGPIzgCGjizrbCTdErt0eEgGs_yWsniEf9w2ueSzaPNoF1u_cSagYzLvde9HpOYWDZk03z7wAUj-bgLyV9GJPGsifyjH5VZxty9_Rs7L6tkgXb81LyQjly6A13YXufSS-yDQnZ2bdC7b3EuaFJdBNTy0-LpvalgvdwyS4YttQ5KFy991MR17bmzK5_BH92SIjNRNKX0KuCu26eliPrI4xjGrF_prx0R4JfTF_GEBoXLLli14ZCOCuTSMY1SX_8jhYrcKB_Y0J3O8a416UaB1kh8WpkQCLJPKvNOPHuAmme3BOfBlBA-ONQCkC0UVGy_mlWYZXrQ0kfv0DDbGfokIrIT2ZHOwVLxNA%3D%3D) **

[** CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT
SUPPORT ELECTABLE CANDIDATES **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2c33611d657540aeb5304ce0a71180ff&_e=epJ12vqb9JAcibzXBNQpQQToKV3uyQo6dN90NuGoHW7rhBa6kT79KAGPIzgCGjizrbCTdErt0eEgGs_yWsniEf9w2ueSzaPNoF1u_cSagYzLvde9HpOYWDZk03z7wAUj-bgLyV9GJPGsifyjH5VZxty9_Rs7L6tkgXb81LyQjly6A13YXufSS-yDQnZ2bdC7b3EuaFJdBNTy0-LpvalgvdwyS4YttQ5KFy991MR17bmzK5_BH92SIjNRNKX0KuCu01oFrCAZpAX6LlQl41qfL99PKlFqLecA-7xQjn-VcvgJhSkXrQdWe8IggMb2jZertBYGm1EIC0lfualr88ZMLaVpIKuIs6UAV4KAQypZtg40QcwqZxRWgc_y0MW9Zf3r6P3UUKdflbhxQmIhF1Zyhg%3D%3D)

**
The Club for Growth is giving Democrats exactly what they want** : a distraction. Instead of supporting the ONLY Republican in West Virginia who can flip this U.S. Senate seat, they’re creating a messy primary that doesn’t need to happen.

**THIS IS EXACTLY WHAT CHUCK SCHUMER AND THE DEMOCRATS WANT.**

We cannot let them win. **

[Chip in any amount you can right now. ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2c33611d657540aeb5304ce0a71180ff&_e=epJ12vqb9JAcibzXBNQpQQToKV3uyQo6dN90NuGoHW7rhBa6kT79KAGPIzgCGjizrbCTdErt0eEgGs_yWsniEf9w2ueSzaPNoF1u_cSagYzLvde9HpOYWDZk03z7wAUj-bgLyV9GJPGsifyjH5VZxty9_Rs7L6tkgXb81LyQjly6A13YXufSS-yDQnZ2bdC7b3EuaFJdBNTy0-LpvalgvdwyS4YttQ5KFy991MR17bmzK5_BH92SIjNRNKX0KuCuO3focKPj1gZTTqupqlNGJ7w0XufkRmXtj_YqMXFyZjdrbdwd4-qDC7dFpEOLGjIXlZI1NTH0tgLxcqMXbGVl6PjQZNNIRgPytK7OPAIgVZ_PVEqfhMTsiyRaTGZ02PHuPNGq2zUEqlLKkJoAy0Szzw%3D%3D)**

Sincerely,

Gov. Jim Justice
Republican for U.S. Senate

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

clean_body: The anti-Trump group, Club for Growth, just announced they raised over $13 million for my Republican primary opponent. | | Fellow Conservative: The Trump-hating political action group, the Club for Growth , announced on Wednesday that they raised $3 million more than they originally pledged - to defeat me and boost my anti-Trump primary opponent. I can’t tell you how bad this is for our chances of winning back the Senate. This group hates former President Donald Trump and has a long history of backing losing candidates in primary fights, preventing us from winning a Republican majority in the U.S. Senate. Instead of backing strong candidates who can win in tough contests, like me, they spend MILLIONS backing candidates who are more concerned about scoring political points. Fellow Conservative, if you’re interested in ensuring our party puts up conservative candidates who can WIN competitive contests, The Club for Growth is giving Democrats exactly what they want : a distraction. Instead of supporting the ONLY Republican in West Virginia who can flip this U.S. Senate seat, they’re creating a messy primary that doesn’t need to happen. THIS IS EXACTLY WHAT CHUCK SCHUMER AND THE DEMOCRATS WANT. We cannot let them win. Sincerely, Gov. Jim Justice Republican for U.S. Senate | MEET JIM Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs. Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team. Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog. Join the Conversation: | Paid for by Jim Justice for Senate

name: Anna Kaplan
subject: Cook Political Report: NY-3 a top pickup opportunity for Democrats in 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Hi, it’s Anna Kaplan, Democratic candidate for Congress against George
Santos.

The Cook Political Report released a preview of the 2024 Congressional
elections, listing NY-3 as one of the top pickup opportunities for
Democrats.

Here’s why: Our district voted for President Biden in 2020. And George
Santos BARELY won his seat in 2022. And we’ve now learned that he LIED his
way to victory.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18998?t=1001&akid=3399%2E346206%2EeKCoWx ]If Democrats retake this seat in 2024, we’ll take a MASSIVE step toward
flipping the House. Will you pitch in $25 or more -- split with Charles
Booker -- to help me defeat Santos and flip the House?

I’ve defeated Republicans before. When I ran for the New York Senate, I
unseated a well-funded Republican Senator, flipped the seat, and flipped
the entire chamber, giving our party a “trifecta” in the New York House,
Senate, and Governorship.

When I defeat George Santos in 2024, we’ll flip the seat from red to blue
and win back control of the House for Democrats, taking the Speaker’s
gavel away from Kevin McCarthy for good.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18998?t=1002&akid=3399%2E346206%2EeKCoWx ]Democratic control of the House runs through New York -- and I need
your help to defeat George Santos. So please, split a donation between
Charles Booker and my campaign now if you can.

Thanks for your support,

Anna Kaplan

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230716-3399-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3399_346206_eKCoWx&akid=3399%2E346206%2EeKCoWx

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

When I defeat George Santos in 2024, we’ll flip the seat from red to blue and win back control of the House for Democrats, taking the Speaker’s gavel away from Kevin McCarthy for good. Fellow Conservative:

The Trump-hating political action group, **the Club for Growth** , announced on Wednesday that they raised $3 million more than they originally pledged - to defeat me and boost my anti-Trump primary opponent.

**I can’t tell you how bad this is for our chances of winning back the Senate.** This group hates former President Donald Trump and has a long history of backing losing candidates in primary fights, preventing us from winning a Republican majority in the U.S. Senate.

**Instead of backing strong candidates who can win in tough contests, like me, they spend MILLIONS backing candidates who are more concerned about scoring political points.**

Fellow Conservative, if you’re interested in ensuring our party puts up conservative candidates who can WIN competitive contests,**[I need you to signal your support for my campaign right now.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=78c86aa6343541998dcc7e24eee907ec&_e=yHO6WapI0H-V84y5JVKv-ipEd7WlJOcztk9X_ACh31Lc2hlcOddcR_lw8auEJyVRKN85c69llBRLkXX27VLkor8RJSHWdCi3ITFWjFwl0xced-k7NJwmRO_jsjvVkRvVaNJIjlpXElHmlpPLLb66YwGCnjGOC9SOYu1sjML4juAKrX6wQ2n7AtyzmkPF-eqUBUxH2LUI9-V_pYC7TT8b0e6LXfcpng0dzdMChDe2BmvmQUo72dLF04fFvcZj9JnWpNubUG38oERtmI-to53l6OzO_nz_1brQfmh5R4BPShTr0uJ35etdwgbKBXJyV2fweoxe63mmy1mPbSgqPopioRyOcbVhFVPFiwrDHhJvl-VwWOpl_nP07BGFiWLd8PMZ3-IDM0xCp__S3-BUlHfVQQ%3D%3D) **

[** CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT
SUPPORT ELECTABLE CANDIDATES **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=78c86aa6343541998dcc7e24eee907ec&_e=yHO6WapI0H-V84y5JVKv-ipEd7WlJOcztk9X_ACh31Lc2hlcOddcR_lw8auEJyVRKN85c69llBRLkXX27VLkor8RJSHWdCi3ITFWjFwl0xced-k7NJwmRO_jsjvVkRvVaNJIjlpXElHmlpPLLb66YwGCnjGOC9SOYu1sjML4juAKrX6wQ2n7AtyzmkPF-eqUBUxH2LUI9-V_pYC7TT8b0e6LXfcpng0dzdMChDe2BmvmQUo72dLF04fFvcZj9JnWIdBSK7XYK2jgkkmFD5NDm4GGUuDw_4sgKZuytQ4Xo5tefHWPvQRyVHIYRAaznSHdiO1GMVwAmYXd-V_5owrtoPrc3VBcqbYCGted0hl1h3qeQqpQV6wwrhM6MeG2Rl3wuL7hYGWJxfHTG10CLB1ToA%3D%3D)

**
The Club for Growth is giving Democrats exactly what they want** : a distraction. Instead of supporting the ONLY Republican in West Virginia who can flip this U.S. Senate seat, they’re creating a messy primary that doesn’t need to happen.

**THIS IS EXACTLY WHAT CHUCK SCHUMER AND THE DEMOCRATS WANT.**

We cannot let them win. **

[Chip in any amount you can right now. ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=78c86aa6343541998dcc7e24eee907ec&_e=yHO6WapI0H-V84y5JVKv-ipEd7WlJOcztk9X_ACh31Lc2hlcOddcR_lw8auEJyVRKN85c69llBRLkXX27VLkor8RJSHWdCi3ITFWjFwl0xced-k7NJwmRO_jsjvVkRvVaNJIjlpXElHmlpPLLb66YwGCnjGOC9SOYu1sjML4juAKrX6wQ2n7AtyzmkPF-eqUBUxH2LUI9-V_pYC7TT8b0e6LXfcpng0dzdMChDe2BmvmQUo72dLF04fFvcZj9JnWD67kcN5XctbZy8y2Bgzwn4NhlcJ4vuW8AbEETyFnxa5MVAVF5VTGTb9WwIqTOKjE7HPw4D6UPf7-nmNmDoy3xjOltX5hlYCuM1SHJ-ECHrcEFn0ObGZOkfWSe-m4r56qu7vJt4Nid5UTbL8EhkPbtQ%3D%3D)**

Sincerely,

Gov. Jim Justice
Republican for U.S. Senate

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team. Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog. Join the Conversation: | Paid for by Jim Justice for Senate

name: Team Baldwin
subject: The Supreme Court’s right-wing majority
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Tammy will always defend LGBTQ Americans’ freedoms.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=597%2E35263%2EFYgzh5)
Peter — From passing the _Respect for Marriage Act_ last year to reintroducing the _Equality Act_ , Tammy has been a leader in the fight to defend LGBTQ+ rights. Meanwhile, the Supreme Court’s right-wing majority is relentlessly coming after the LGBTQ+ community. Justice Clarence Thomas has called for _Obergefell v. Hodges_ — the case that established nationwide marriage equality — to be “reconsidered,” and the Supreme Court just ruled a few weeks ago that creative businesses are allowed to discriminate against LGBTQ+ Americans. **Now more than ever, we need champions of equality like Tammy to be our voice in Congress.** That’s what she’s focused on every single day in the Senate, but we _must_ defend and expand our Democratic majority to ensure we can cement those protections. **[With your help, we know we have what it takes to defend Tammy’s seat so she can continue being that leader in the Senate — but first, we have to meet tonight’s mid-month goal. Will you rush in a donation of any amount you can spare today?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jul23.xghWlz&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20230716_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=597%2E35263%2EFYgzh5)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-jul23.4Adudz&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20230716_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=597%2E35263%2EFYgzh5)

name: Pat Ryan
subject: Top target
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Ryan for Congress
body:
|
---
Team, I was recently named one of the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee’s Frontline members. Only a small number of House Democrats were added to this program to support the most critical races in the country. Being named a “Frontliner” means this will be one of the most competitive districts in the 2024 election, and that means it will take serious, early investment to hold this seat. Last year, I was the only Democrat to win a swing seat in New York — and we did so by a 1-point margin. Our campaign resonated with voters across the Hudson Valley: we delivered a clear message about the stakes of our election and focused on tangible differences we could make in people’s lives. The House Republican campaign arm has already named me a top-five target to defeat — and with that comes a flood of GOP spending. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66576998/416831827/-138733819?refcode=AU_PKR_FR_REA_GEN_INau_202307_SR2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85OTAyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTdjMjliNy1lOTIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vvIGMb6XoW4mCZ559JK5qXYrgd7LyBJujQev2KyN6e0=) **I’m ready to take on anything Republicans throw our way because I know that we will continue to stand up for what is right and the Hudson Valley will continue to stand with me.** But truthfully, it’s going to take a lot of resources to win again next year. clean_body: | Team, I was recently named one of the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee’s Frontline members. Only a small number of House Democrats were added to this program to support the most critical races in the country. Being named a “Frontliner” means this will be one of the most competitive districts in the 2024 election, and that means it will take serious, early investment to hold this seat. Last year, I was the only Democrat to win a swing seat in New York — and we did so by a 1-point margin. Our campaign resonated with voters across the Hudson Valley: we delivered a clear message about the stakes of our election and focused on tangible differences we could make in people’s lives. The House Republican campaign arm has already named me a top-five target to defeat — and with that comes a flood of GOP spending. = I’m ready to take on anything Republicans throw our way because I know that we will continue to stand up for what is right and the Hudson Valley will continue to stand with me. But truthfully, it’s going to take a lot of resources to win again next year. Being named a target for Republicans this early means that the floodgates of their dark money spending will open up before we know it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for your help — I’m so glad I can count on you. subject: Stepping down as Lt. Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Robinson
body:
Please see my full statement

| |
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=297445dc067b4199b9cd3382892a35aa&_e=EYgHubgkurAu_5bdljauJ8spFAKdDf8_Ui9-OnPQhcOyEl4SPp0C_1mYvEctGGDVMSWMUZ7YFs0pUl6TCDb0Sj8ZxRgSA3d12revgoz46lgswZTqeQK3PsG9fqJBJH7UzV80XBKpVO6SHaXkeioJA-Lgcl-KPOD7YaAD4mbSEZaeKL7aOqHYOWh6hA6uF2aJTYQnxLL52YAa___2FkIYGvfrSPTAnhwZ3d_fP8oKU84YUGxnlSKg5ekK-Y1lt8DOZPKo5svLGfbRguZhyOLW1vgmrU5wGfLdb_2k_9z0w0QpwyIPfsUnS88NuCNiRIR-R_KBvrpRPCnP5L2JaQ3PIrXp0KR5Og4aHRMm82z0lE8n2S1EsfLp5bnZts0pSK80aunh7WoYfNvBMnTPv18RZk-cBZvSHhumiI2NL_VyDHC08ICAZGPegYxFmD2OYPb0WPedr2TRa5W9U2c9VW1Du40KzPCy2TiTwfMH7fqdFbo%3D)

**MARK ROBINSON RESPONDS AFTER RADICAL DEMOCRATS CALL ON HIM TO RESIGN**
---

In 2020 we made American history & humiliated the radical Democrats when I became the first black Lt. Governor of North Carolina.

**But because I 'm a conservative that blows a hole in their sacred narrative, they called on me to step down before I was sworn in and they called for my impeachment after I took the oath of office. **

Those calls continue to this day- and that is all they will ever be.

And now I'm the leading conservative candidate running for Governor of North Carolina.

Every poll shows this is going to be the closest race in America.

But Joe Biden & the liberal elite are spending millions to permanently end my candidacy because of who I am & what I represent. My existence as a black conservative enrages them.

They hate that I was able to pick myself up by my bootstraps to pursue the American Dream & determine my own destiny.

**They hate that the first black Governor of North Carolina could be a Republican like me & with your support today, it most certainly will.**
**[SUPPORT MARK ROBINSON FOR GOVERNOR](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=297445dc067b4199b9cd3382892a35aa&_e=EYgHubgkurAu_5bdljauJ8spFAKdDf8_Ui9-OnPQhcOyEl4SPp0C_1mYvEctGGDVMSWMUZ7YFs0pUl6TCDb0Sj8ZxRgSA3d12revgoz46lgswZTqeQK3PsG9fqJBJH7UzV80XBKpVO6SHaXkeioJA-Lgcl-KPOD7YaAD4mbSEZaeKL7aOqHYOWh6hA6uF2aJTYQnxLL52YAa___2FkIYGvfrSPTAnhwZ3d_fP8oKU84YUGxnlSKg5ekK-Y1lt8DOZPKo5svLGfbRguZhyOLW1vgmrU5wGfLdb_2k_9z0w0QpwyIPfsUnS88NuCNiRIR-R_KBvrpRPCnP5L2JaQ3PIiAsqigNsm9eiC7l0ki7zHI5yNs8AmEuXAToq5F0yBlTDcP03B13ziZb47QjNy17cLRPcqo5ZeL36jjkvS-UZA2QbrO_nPim3UnULBzg_260terb2j76Iv6D4X92dRtniO__kJ22dVhYCaZvjrXVV3s%3D)**
---

I won't beat around the bush a minute more- this is the most important battleground race in the nation & together we can deliver Joe Biden & the liberal narrative a humiliating & historic upset.

**So I 'm humbly asking if you'll support me with your kindness & generosity just one more time before Biden & the Democrat machine hit us with their million dollar advertising blitz to end my candidacy.**
**[SUPPORT MARK ROBINSON FOR GOVERNOR](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=297445dc067b4199b9cd3382892a35aa&_e=EYgHubgkurAu_5bdljauJ8spFAKdDf8_Ui9-OnPQhcOyEl4SPp0C_1mYvEctGGDVMSWMUZ7YFs0pUl6TCDb0Sj8ZxRgSA3d12revgoz46lgswZTqeQK3PsG9fqJBJH7UzV80XBKpVO6SHaXkeioJA-Lgcl-KPOD7YaAD4mbSEZaeKL7aOqHYOWh6hA6uF2aJTYQnxLL52YAa___2FkIYGvfrSPTAnhwZ3d_fP8oKU84YUGxnlSKg5ekK-Y1lt8DOZPKo5svLGfbRguZhyOLW1vgmrU5wGfLdb_2k_9z0w0QpwyIPfsUnS88NuCNiRIR-R_KBvrpRPCnP5L2JaQ3PIuLimrhjx7efCGbw_Lbec5f0nDTEt98lXtLhvfcTBYzDGkN0_6ZZ1eqDkxYs8cx0qoILdKRh-SBxYr8EbN1LQn_jmSGuevTFb-ycRzX164IVklVXSo2C7aQXlJBqcLI8xjWvG4V7ajZVzK1rQOEuwDs%3D)**
---

This is the most important race in the nation & this is the most impactful thing you can do to help us make history & defeat Joe Biden.

THANK YOU.

-Mark Robinson

subject: This new lawsuit could crush me
body:
Hi, I'm James O'Keefe. You may not know me, but you've seen my breaking stories many times on cable TV and on the Internet. | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62958670:68B34VINN:m:1:3299561967:3F7D31416583FAFC638C2DA1B37208B7:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62958670:68B34VINN:m:1:3299561967:3F7D31416583FAFC638C2DA1B37208B7:r) Dear Patriot,

[**A new lawsuit could crush my investigative reporting at this crucial time for our country. Please help me beat this in court with your critical gift now.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62958670:68B34VINN:m:1:3299561967:3F7D31416583FAFC638C2DA1B37208B7:r)

Hi, I'm James O'Keefe. You may not know me, but you've seen my breaking stories many times on cable TV and on the Internet.

If you tuned in to the late, great Rush Limbaugh's show five years ago, you heard him say I was "an intrepid 'guerrila journalist' "whose undercover reporting has shown the light of truth on leftist organizations' slimy secrets."

I can't tell you how exciting and encouraging it was hear my hero say that to me!

**Rush and I talked about how important it was to expose the bad guys ... to bypass the lies and spin of the liberal media ... and get the truth to the American people.**

And we talked about the steep price I paid to do that - the attacks, smears, and lawsuits.

Well, the lawsuits haven't stopped.

In fact, a new lawsuit has been filed against me by people I used to work with - people I wish only the best for.

**Let me tell you, this new lawsuit is dangerous, and it could crush my investigative reporting.**

The people who filed it don't just want to beat me by a touchdown ... they aim to smash me flat, and send me off the field on a stretcher.

**I don 't know why they're doing it ... but they're playing for keeps.**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62958670:68B34VINN:m:1:3299561967:3F7D31416583FAFC638C2DA1B37208B7:r)** that will quickly pile up.

Fighting this lawsuit will be time consuming and extremely expensive. It may cost $500,000 or more.

But I remember what Rush told me in that interview:

**" You're being attacked precisely because it's important enough to them to silence you. You're being attacked because you're effective, and I hope you continue it."**

[**Will you help me defend myself in court and keep getting the truth to our fellow Americans with your critically important gift right away?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62958670:68B34VINN:m:1:3299561967:3F7D31416583FAFC638C2DA1B37208B7:r)

I hope your answer is an enthusiastic YES!

I can't do it without you.

Thank you so much!

Respectfully,

James O'Keefe

**P.S. this new lawsuit could not only silence me, it could smash me flat.[Please help me defend myself in court with your crucial gift right away.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62958670:68B34VINN:m:1:3299561967:3F7D31416583FAFC638C2DA1B37208B7:r) **Thank you!
---
