name: Mark Warner
subject: The fate of abortion in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
can you chip in to help me elect pro-choice Dems?

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66579528/416842118/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2VkZDdlMS1mMTIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g5aZ2YwLBz7PiCcBIrZP4akGQYlRrPYOEKanADJmrTQ=&emci=6563c884-c821-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=07edd7e1-f123-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Right now, abortion in Virginia is legal up to 26 weeks, and even later if the pregnant person’s life is at risk. The Commonwealth _is the only Southern state that hasn’t banned or rolled back abortion rights since Roe was overturned._ But this freedom hinges on this year’s election, where our entire state legislature is on the ballot. And right now, **GOP candidates are united around a 15-week abortion ban.** I’m determined to put a stop to their draconian ban by making sure Democrats win their races to hold on to the Virginia Senate and take back the House of Delegates. **_[Can you chip in $5 before our mid-month deadline to fuel my work to elect pro-choice Democrats to the General Assembly?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66579533/416842127/-423155490?refcode=mw_em_230716_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2VkZDdlMS1mMTIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g5aZ2YwLBz7PiCcBIrZP4akGQYlRrPYOEKanADJmrTQ=)_** After _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned, I read one too many devastating stories about the impact it had on women in Virginia and around the country. Doctors having to consult lawyers before providing abortions to women in dire health conditions. Women fleeing to other states to receive life-saving care, paralyzed with fear of the repercussions they’d face. This is unacceptable. If we want to protect access to reproductive health care in Virginia, we need to stop the GOP from taking over the General Assembly. **_[Donate today to help my team and I do whatever it takes to turn Virginia blue so we can protect abortion access in the Commonwealth>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66579544/416842147/-423155490?refcode=mw_em_230716_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2VkZDdlMS1mMTIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g5aZ2YwLBz7PiCcBIrZP4akGQYlRrPYOEKanADJmrTQ=)_** Thank you, Mark Warner ********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66579555/416842198/-423155490?refcode=mw_em_230716_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2VkZDdlMS1mMTIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g5aZ2YwLBz7PiCcBIrZP4akGQYlRrPYOEKanADJmrTQ=)********

| | Friend,

---
Last night, I spoke at the 2023 Turning Point Action Conference.

---
The crowd there was ELECTRIFYING.

---
Friend, I see the polls every day showing that we have a 30, 40, even 50-point lead...

---
...But being in that room, you could just see how much support and love we _truly_ have from the PEOPLE.

---
_I made the case as to why I should be the Republican nominee for president in 2024._

---
We need to wrap up the primary as quickly as possible so that we can focus on the REAL battle: _firing the corrupt and incompetent puppet occupying the White House.

subject: Not the email we had hoped to send you today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

This isn’t the email we had hoped to send you today.

We just barely missed our $35,000 mid-month fundraising goal. But, the
good news is that if one in three folks who read this email today each
chip in $3 then we can make up for this shortfall.

Look, we don’t have tens of millions of dollars in the bank like the
Democratic establishment. We reject all corporate PAC contributions

Thank you for your solidarity,

Team JD

name: Val Hoyle
subject: I voted against the NDAA. Here’s why:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66581401/416848971/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWYxMTAyMS1mNjIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NatoLnhg5hcD5vGcYpk7vOrNTzyY0G6XDmiUI3OM7Sc=&emci=957628d2-bb23-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=99f11021-f623-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9636579)
---

| | **I voted against the House-passed National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA), Peter, and I want you to know why.** There are many debates and valid reasons to both support and oppose the annual NDAA that Congress has passed with strong bipartisan votes for the past 60 years. The NDAA passed out of the House Armed Services Committee last week with very little opposition, 58-1. **But when the NDAA came to the House floor, Kevin McCarthy caved to his party's extremists,** who loaded the final version of this legislation with controversial and unrelated amendments to further their culture war against women, LGBTQ+ service members and their families, common sense climate change policies, and DEI programs critical to military recruitment and readiness. By any measure, **you simply cannot say you care about our military service members and then cram unrelated, divisive – and harmful – amendments into a previously bipartisan bill.** I had concerns with the original bill, as I wanted to see greater accountability and transparency in Department of Defense spending, which doesn't have nearly enough focus on actually supporting our service members and their families. I also strongly support a return of the Congress's constitutional war powers authority, and I introduced a bipartisan amendment to prohibit unauthorized involvement in the war in Yemen. I also cosponsored amendments to end unapproved military involvement in Syria and to repeal the outdated Authorizations for the Use of Military Force. There were also aspects of the NDAA that I strongly supported, like the 5.2% pay raise for military service members and provisions to lower housing, healthcare, and childcare costs to provide much needed relief to our service members and their families. **These things are all in jeopardy because Kevin McCarthy and the GOP leadership have sent an NDAA bill that they know is DOA in the Senate.** I could not in good conscience support this highly politicized, dangerous, and irresponsible version of the bill which would hurt our service members and their families, hurt our military readiness, and does nothing to rein in runaway spending within the military industrial complex. **I came to Congress to represent the people of the 4th district of Oregon and promised to work hard, focus on outcomes, work in a bipartisan way, vote my values, and do what is best for our country.** I am incredibly frustrated that Kevin McCarthy doesn't have the vision or integrity to lead the House of Representatives to do the same. Ugh — I just got off the phone with the team and I hate to say it, but I got some bad news. We fell short of our mid-month fundraising goal last night. We didn’t fall short by a lot, but it was enough to have an impact. If we don’t make up the difference today, my team and I will start having tough conversations about what efforts we need to cut moving forward — whether it’s winning back the House, protecting abortion access, supporting women candidates, or something else. | | I have to be honest. I am deeply worried about the future of our country. **For years we have seen extremists building power in the Republican Party, and we are seeing that extremism reflected in the people they elect and the agendas that they set.** In 2020, I asked you to join me in a mission to Dump Trump, Ditch Mitch and Save America. We did the first two when we defeated Trump and won the Senate, kicking Mitch McConnell out of the Majority Leader's office. **We have made some huge strides since then – we confirmed Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court, made historic investments in infrastructure, and passed the Inflation Reduction Act – but we have A LOT more work to do.** Important work that will come to a screaming halt if we allow Mitch and the Republicans to win back control of the Senate next year. [**Will you join our grassroots movement today and fight to keep Mitch McConnell out of the majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66581551/416849452/-641752998?refcode=2023-07-16-mitch-mm-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=d15a21da-f623-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTVhMjFkYS1mNjIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ha9VVUuL7oxUhmXQEkpBVrNjOVmguJqbd0G4VgJH3sE=) [no way, mitch](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66581554/416849460/-641752998?refcode=2023-07-16-mitch-mm-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=d15a21da-f623-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTVhMjFkYS1mNjIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ha9VVUuL7oxUhmXQEkpBVrNjOVmguJqbd0G4VgJH3sE=) We all remember what it was like under Majority Leader McConnell – stolen Supreme Court seats, tax cuts for corporations and billionaires – and we can't allow it to happen again. We have a tough fight ahead of us next year to keep the Senate majority. Like I said, I'm worried about our future. [**But the future is worth fighting for. Are you with me? name: Adam Schiff
subject: Bad news for Republicans:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Hey there,
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a small donation between Seth Moulton and our campaign ahead of our midnight deadline [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff] . But first, I wanted to explain why your gift is so important — especially right now.
From the moment I jumped into the race, Republicans piled on.
It actually started the night right before I announced my campaign. In one of Kevin McCarthy’s first acts as Speaker, he unilaterally removed me from serving on the House Intelligence Committee.
Then it was Matt Gaetz. He introduced legislation trying to bar me from accessing classified information.
Then came Tucker Carlson. He recently launched into a desperate rant about me on his primetime Fox News show.
Then Donald Trump piled on too. He couldn’t resist. He dedicated part of his CPAC speech to hurl insult after insult against me.
And I’m going to be honest, I don’t even send you the really crazy stuff.
It’s just the beginning. After every one of their attacks, I then receive thousands more like it online from their MAGA loyalists trying to sabotage our work to defend democracy.
Republicans see me as their boogeyman this election. Why? Because I’ve stood up to these bullies and called out their lies.
It’s clear they don’t want me in the Senate. They don’t want oversight. They don’t want me to hold them accountable. They don’t want an outspoken defender of democracy on the Senate floor.
Bad news for Republicans: I’ve never been one to give up a fight — especially when it gets tough. I’m not going to let Donald Trump or any one of his lackeys tear our campaign down.
Friend, I need to know you have my back the entire way. Will you pitch in a donation of $3 or more to Seth Moulton and our campaign before our midnight deadline? The attacks are only going to get nastier from here, so we need to prepare for everything they’re going to launch our way: [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Thank you for your support,
— Adam

clean_body: [] Hey there, In a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a small donation between Seth Moulton and our campaign ahead of our midnight deadline [] . But first, I wanted to explain why your gift is so important — especially right now. From the moment I jumped into the race, Republicans piled on. It actually started the night right before I announced my campaign. In one of Kevin McCarthy’s first acts as Speaker, he unilaterally removed me from serving on the House Intelligence Committee. Then it was Matt Gaetz. He introduced legislation trying to bar me from accessing classified information. Then came Tucker Carlson. He recently launched into a desperate rant about me on his primetime Fox News show. Then Donald Trump piled on too. He couldn’t resist. He dedicated part of his CPAC speech to hurl insult after insult against me. And I’m going to be honest, I don’t even send you the really crazy stuff. It’s just the beginning. After every one of their attacks, I then receive thousands more like it online from their MAGA loyalists trying to sabotage our work to defend democracy. Republicans see me as their boogeyman this election. Why? Because I’ve stood up to these bullies and called out their lies. It’s clear they don’t want me in the Senate. They don’t want oversight. They don’t want me to hold them accountable. They don’t want an outspoken defender of democracy on the Senate floor. Bad news for Republicans: I’ve never been one to give up a fight — especially when it gets tough. I’m not going to let Donald Trump or any one of his lackeys tear our campaign down. Friend, I need to know you have my back the entire way. Will you pitch in a donation of $3 or more to Seth Moulton and our campaign before our midnight deadline? The attacks are only going to get nastier from here, so we need to prepare for everything they’re going to launch our way: [] Donate [] Thank you for your support, — Adam Donate [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . name: =?utf-8?Q?Supervisor=20David=20Canepa?=
subject: The Best Birthday Gift
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463**
body:
| | | | [ ](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=a11d978654&e=c0babbc643)
---
| | | My birthday is coming up, and the gift I really want is to celebrate it with you, my core team of supporters. Can you join us for food, fun and maybe an embarrassing round of “Happy Birthday"? Wednesday, August 9th
5:30 pm Plumbers Union Hall
1519 Rollins Road, Burlingame [](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=e85c76b4fe&e=c0babbc643) Turning another year older is a good reminder of how much I love the job of representing you on the Board of Supervisors, and how much important work we still have to do together:
* Preparing for climate change by making investments to combat wildfires, flooding and sea level rise
* Improving health care, including greater access to mental health services and interventions
* Housing homeless individuals and families and providing intensive wraparound services such as job training

[](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=4b5fd2d910&e=c0babbc643) I would still very much appreciate anything you can donate – the limit for this race is $2,000 per donor and every dollar helps get our message out! Hope to see you August 9th! Best regards, David Canepa, San Mateo County Supervisor, District 5 P.S. No matter the size of your contribution, donating today is the best birthday present you could give me – I would be so grateful if you could [pitch in](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=216b6d643e&e=c0babbc643) today. **Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463**
---

name: Robert Garcia
subject: I wouldn't be emailing on a Sunday if it were not necessary.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66582235/416852070/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTZmOTY0NS1mYTIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5ocLO4j5CyTqgPS-tpPDC4mB-DPgBxPQTAqZa2zrLqY=)
Friends, I know it’s Sunday, a day a lot of people use to rest and spend time with their loved ones. I try to do the same, so I don’t typically like to email you. But I needed to reach out today with an important request.
Tonight at midnight my team and I face our July mid-month fundraising deadline, and we are pacing behind our projected goal. At this point in the month, **we should be 30% to our goal** , but in all transparency, **we are only 16% there.**
This news is alarming for my team and me. Sure we have half of the month left to make up lost ground, but the truth is our campaign relies on folks like you, contributing what you can when you can, not corporations or special interests. So we have no option but to make steady progress on our goal every single day.
We can’t afford to continue pacing behind our goals. We risk losing critical resources that help us run the day-to-day of my reelection campaign.
So I am reaching out today, on a Sunday, to ask:
[**Can you please contribute $3 or whatever you can afford to my reelection campaign before midnight tonight? We need to get as close as we can to that 30% mark.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66582243/416852076/1180538877?refcode2=b56f9645-fa23-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&refcode=em230716-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTZmOTY0NS1mYTIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5ocLO4j5CyTqgPS-tpPDC4mB-DPgBxPQTAqZa2zrLqY=)
Thank you for opening this email, for reading till the end, and for providing your continued support to me and our campaign. It means a lot to me and our team.
Robert
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66582246/416852083/1180538877?refcode2=b56f9645-fa23-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&refcode=em230716-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTZmOTY0NS1mYTIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5ocLO4j5CyTqgPS-tpPDC4mB-DPgBxPQTAqZa2zrLqY=)**

* * *
Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress

Long Beach, CA 90802

subject: This is a major distraction
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Justice for Senate
body:

Peter:

The Trump-hating political action group, **the Club for Growth** , announced on Wednesday that they raised $3 million more than they originally pledged - to defeat me and boost my anti-Trump primary opponent.

**I can’t tell you how bad this is for our chances of winning back the Senate.** This group hates former President Donald Trump and has a long history of backing losing candidates in primary fights, preventing us from winning a Republican majority in the U.S. Senate.

**Instead of backing strong candidates who can win in tough contests, like me, they spend MILLIONS backing candidates who are more concerned about scoring political points.**

Peter, if you’re interested in ensuring our party puts up conservative candidates who can WIN competitive contests,**[I need you to signal your support for my campaign right now.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c3fd5f1f6e29415db246534706d590f5&_e=4OavY1Y46j9lz4FlSgwWJVTPDas6-539FMPs-OWEqKdymiPZcEpINRLPneMfa_I_D77wgT5nIrYtC3qOZbI6OllS9QQiTxY1vPAy_JFcLWnXzjG7DqP4gTNKt8fI3uonjnpeIBLyxOCd4hXzhQBACL6VDJ4xXdv_hdHEYuC0dGRYNjAWSKstDR81fidS71EGICljhm0CeWXpRCx2fIB3VHKCcwi-sqUXwqIWwABJ0rrYsDmDqIOWivNOsXc3oxEkCgtcbyqR5uVGX2AkGjScdjrOfDN6QI-HCLGooiKxtlzqCzSoI4BgM3WUMhgHPrLyKQm4mmmqEnmnZK47g4bdget9g4PJBxoXdQN6FTdzHyHH04Qu2zHSeC9GKpb0Gxl4l-uRGsFiP8bBg4de4nZhag%3D%3D) **

[** CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT
SUPPORT ELECTABLE CANDIDATES **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c3fd5f1f6e29415db246534706d590f5&_e=4OavY1Y46j9lz4FlSgwWJVTPDas6-539FMPs-OWEqKdymiPZcEpINRLPneMfa_I_D77wgT5nIrYtC3qOZbI6OllS9QQiTxY1vPAy_JFcLWnXzjG7DqP4gTNKt8fI3uonjnpeIBLyxOCd4hXzhQBACL6VDJ4xXdv_hdHEYuC0dGRYNjAWSKstDR81fidS71EGICljhm0CeWXpRCx2fIB3VHKCcwi-sqUXwqIWwABJ0rrYsDmDqIOWivNOsXc3oxEklZjKIsx3sI2NWPekddP3y0KHMqOPcPBvw_orLJjB81n2-7mBmEBq6Rdsszr1XfCl9Vg-n1ug4eY662YpxMcz_QZ39_4d1qD6sAa0NTmpqZZap5-mRW4r9ilpesiYztyAKzUG9HX3LVlrl-o2FmZ1uA%3D%3D)

**
The Club for Growth is giving Democrats exactly what they want** : a distraction. Instead of supporting the ONLY Republican in West Virginia who can flip this U.S. Senate seat, they’re creating a messy primary that doesn’t need to happen.

**THIS IS EXACTLY WHAT CHUCK SCHUMER AND THE DEMOCRATS WANT.**

We cannot let them win. **

[Chip in any amount you can right now. ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c3fd5f1f6e29415db246534706d590f5&_e=4OavY1Y46j9lz4FlSgwWJVTPDas6-539FMPs-OWEqKdymiPZcEpINRLPneMfa_I_D77wgT5nIrYtC3qOZbI6OllS9QQiTxY1vPAy_JFcLWnXzjG7DqP4gTNKt8fI3uonjnpeIBLyxOCd4hXzhQBACL6VDJ4xXdv_hdHEYuC0dGRYNjAWSKstDR81fidS71EGICljhm0CeWXpRCx2fIB3VHKCcwi-sqUXwqIWwABJ0rrYsDmDqIOWivNOsXc3oxEkKlPNzawNRJUnCQXOMLsKK4o4rwYwi-KmQPF6KtPcuUNtsh3KaVb0p186xlX1z-bFMvuwVBG9vj2WAjGGki9E9ZERGGHM95VXS4Kirp2AMRANCFpyJh7DtssGALy34u_S4YsPYLV1yS_2rLtaf2fzFA%3D%3D)**

Sincerely,

Gov. Jim Justice
Republican for U.S. Senate

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

[** Join **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c3fd5f1f6e29415db246534706d590f5&_e=4OavY1Y46j9lz4FlSgwWJVTPDas6-539FMPs-OWEqKdymiPZcEpINRLPneMfa_I_D77wgT5nIrYtC3qOZbI6OllS9QQiTxY1vPAy_JFcLWnXzjG7DqP4gTNKt8fI3uonjnpeIBLyxOCd4hXzhQBACL6VDJ4xXdv_hdHEYuC0dGRYNjAWSKstDR81fidS71EGICljhm0CeWXpRCx2fIB3VHKCcwi-sqUXwqIWwABJ0rrYsDmDqIOWivNOsXc3oxEkvQ22GxTOp9Nw0ekKd2FoStTi0yMvgCHwoFr2ylVhNHKziz_s1mFXpiFWYtePORooUkZswflotP2LYIi4NEC2lD_Xvwo2Xd196Q5AFb1z0gC4duV_wBSiXv2AsDVqGx-1tV00kRXR9RwkvhlLdFAVXQ%3D%3D)

Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog. Join the Conversation: | Paid for by Jim Justice for Senate

body:
Women and girls are becoming victims of the woke mob.
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5e04acbefc074a8793fec99177c90b47&_e=DKSDyT3gfa8xltCGj0Dy8NCsTeoNCeazClzwlTh-Csv0JWSbB_ovEGJEY3r8cRqw6RoR_ZYaPOOOfycltyAPuwWeI-GurzNxFoSlCfiie6L80taWBUW0S7z0IywX0Ua1Wr0IyMJF33WVoYO_eTRPG7n3GlCDQdT1hstSjg_1OqlSMGtKYIlliDdI5Kq9WlONyCfT4fLnioQBJ8u1mEf14sroL1CZw60T6oyOk2IrZFfx8Apv34QdZoHweWvE2JJPD00DQTz8m5IqFuGxtPE6bEhIPMMyTsdsvHilvKXW-SAgpMy11m12iDe6sW-nabBdAa6eB_hFWY5azy5IhiIm4rkcbAkMSw5ywpUYGxhE5WRTqOybSyaP8uYdn7dJSSv32HzFuM5ElMBLDbmOL4RiMoAei-QAjF8F1XZRcL9ACFL3gpJU5mCGSycdfgPGkPrBErwVXj1hzdsR2jMZidnGzA%3D%3D)

Friend, The Left loves to tout the idea of "equal opportunity," but they're more than happy to strip women and girls of the opportunity to compete fairly in sports without facing off against a competitor twice their size.
---
| [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5e04acbefc074a8793fec99177c90b47&_e=DKSDyT3gfa8xltCGj0Dy8NCsTeoNCeazClzwlTh-Csv0JWSbB_ovEGJEY3r8cRqw6RoR_ZYaPOOOfycltyAPuwWeI-GurzNxFoSlCfiie6L80taWBUW0S7z0IywX0Ua1Wr0IyMJF33WVoYO_eTRPG7n3GlCDQdT1hstSjg_1OqlSMGtKYIlliDdI5Kq9WlONyCfT4fLnioQBJ8u1mEf14sroL1CZw60T6oyOk2IrZFfx8Apv34QdZoHweWvE2JJPD00DQTz8m5IqFuGxtPE6bEhIPMMyTsdsvHilvKXW-SAgpMy11m12iDe6sW-nabBdMnTn1SgBVtHrbAn7FAEhBS9csBzgfTm1b6SecWDMBbESHwFCK4jDEJkmz-gNwFMBmqqcF7m-JhLHQAgflC3sX47YO-7s1SGJay7IqBc5yEyedxdWl6946wAPEoXBCBfnFqX5co9lYEWnTw5n7U2q9A%3D%3D)
---
**When I say it 's time to restore common sense, this is what I mean.** Stories like Riley Gaines' are all too common right now: a woman forced to compete against biological males, being forced to share a locker room with men, and feeling abandoned by elected leaders for not standing up for her and all women and girls in sports. I want our girls and women athletes to have opportunities to compete with fairness and with integrity. That cannot happen when you allow males to compete in women's sports. When the radical Left takes someone that swam on the men's team for three years, then switched to the women's team, and crowns them the women's champion, they're asking us to be complicit in a fraud. **_I am not willing to accept this. _**
---

---
In this state, I have signed legislation to keep males from intruding on the safety of women's locker rooms, prohibited puberty blockers and operations on gender for minors, and outlawed the pronoun Olympics being imposed on teachers. Male athletes should not get to take over women's sports, children should not be told they were born in the wrong body, and we should NEVER opt for mutilation for elementary students. Friend, I know this is wrong, and none of it has a place in our society. It's time we step up, say what needs to be said, and take action. My campaign would be greatly impacted by a donation of $50 from every one of our supporters. If you're willing to take action with me, I am asking for your support today.

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: I’d be really grateful if you took the time to read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I'm hoping you'll read this all the way through.

| |
---
| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. I wanted to take a few minutes today to share something personal with you, but it's going to take a bit of explaining. **If you get to the end and still don 't understand my commitment to America, then I'm just appreciative that you took the time to read this in its entirety.**

I wanted to take some time to discuss my background so you understand where I'm coming from when I'm fighting for the American people.
| | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=53f183ad2f744f38af99c70fad2440e6&_e=8XjUR22hPB8ZCLqJrkRDvuQFer0OESCdsck1Saha0CrV-EytxPhFa0eOgNfaiO0sQMG7FIshTZiOsmqb6DZZhNCNE4Tc9vQsuJ-KnGpmaOoBOuTrcDTAWxCmyTXmLg0gWv3tzhwc1nEG-0WyOXjBa2bf3C2kE0Pk2z84rJdEQkHkqkLM9qKHkBrI3MGNFdNpstC9kXCkbRycTt6kkY3AkaC0zrE6s-RB3DGQgewqTzcsZVsQYjail2__Dr7OH5R30-W9reBuC3nyGHIX3lc-uig9z1aUPaDqyDaTUXtS4xFNj43z0GAks2lGJS85dobL40MHTGAdpaP9WdTRclB2OemocPv1Ycnq7krUZrNPQg-iPb4nuHUv9MITdpA-65AdkLBqiUGe3w8mP5IzpVdOJA%3D%3D "Kevin as a baby with his dad")
---
| [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=53f183ad2f744f38af99c70fad2440e6&_e=8XjUR22hPB8ZCLqJrkRDvuQFer0OESCdsck1Saha0CrV-EytxPhFa0eOgNfaiO0sQMG7FIshTZiOsmqb6DZZhNCNE4Tc9vQsuJ-KnGpmaOoBOuTrcDTAWxCmyTXmLg0gWv3tzhwc1nEG-0WyOXjBa2bf3C2kE0Pk2z84rJdEQkHkqkLM9qKHkBrI3MGNFdNpstC9kXCkbRycTt6kkY3AkaC0zrE6s-RB3DGQgewqTzcx8AeuTcyLMVN5VnerPjhiT28GQiWystnaypvVCxogJcZ_MQ_yJiSd_pXDuTOaxEcJo6qvmflPj34JHOKSDd39wkYpTjraaHCiZTiNDeX6o7WWaK89w4aWEy1YfHEKZir1pGMHwgnhUghY484dD0M2fAAo5_1p5nXFBKfAc9VYqQ%3D%3D "Kevin with his siblings in 1968")
---
_My dad and I, circa 1966._ | _My siblings, Shelly and Mark, and I, circa 1968._

I come from a working-class background. My grandparents were immigrants. My mom, Roberta, was a homemaker. My dad, Owen, was an assistant city fire chief. **They instilled a strong work ethic in me that I carry with me every day.**
| [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=53f183ad2f744f38af99c70fad2440e6&_e=8XjUR22hPB8ZCLqJrkRDvuQFer0OESCdsck1Saha0CrV-EytxPhFa0eOgNfaiO0sQMG7FIshTZiOsmqb6DZZhNCNE4Tc9vQsuJ-KnGpmaOoBOuTrcDTAWxCmyTXmLg0gWv3tzhwc1nEG-0WyOXjBa2bf3C2kE0Pk2z84rJdEQkHkqkLM9qKHkBrI3MGNFdNpstC9kXCkbRycTt6kkY3AkaC0zrE6s-RB3DGQgewqTzfdTL6jagRxOwWq6_8Wf6ADiBm5njGjx9nwtwwzdpXuJOXlJcXuPrpJlGGH1vQYAhHGGQi0yP5aGvYPOd4Y7ejNbkK6J--2HVbKU4TgOnbOlqy5cdk9RDOio7em5_yMAqQol6BeHPJefqTrWz85IoDztS6vZd9wMu97d9A0epek3g%3D%3D "Kevin working the counter at Kevin O's Deli & McCarthy's Yogurt.")
---
_Working the counter at Kevin O's Deli & McCarthy's Yogurt. (Sorry for the image quality, but at least you'll know it's authentic!)_

When I was 19, I ran my first business, Kevin O's Deli, selling sandwiches out of the back of my uncle's yogurt shop. Eventually, I sold the deli to pay my way through college. It taught me a lot about personal responsibility, and **I quickly learned how overregulation by the government affects small businesses. **
| [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=53f183ad2f744f38af99c70fad2440e6&_e=8XjUR22hPB8ZCLqJrkRDvuQFer0OESCdsck1Saha0CrV-EytxPhFa0eOgNfaiO0sQMG7FIshTZiOsmqb6DZZhNCNE4Tc9vQsuJ-KnGpmaOoBOuTrcDTAWxCmyTXmLg0gWv3tzhwc1nEG-0WyOXjBa2bf3C2kE0Pk2z84rJdEQkHkqkLM9qKHkBrI3MGNFdNpstC9kXCkbRycTt6kkY3AkaC0zrE6s-RB3DGQgewqTzeuO57sJSnyXTGfyQFOhH_ONviZzEimixkrD35bzCDx_C0Q1wg_xNzQPiy8mXPZJOS-EvPZDIQzmXqya0pMEGZy8nGvq5CJVqa3uW4EYMWquQQep4u4yr9yle3FOXnPufw5OlMtC3ooXNjkZUycfHjkRf9SjOKbAiOEKZhxbiKlbg%3D%3D "Kevin speaking with a farmer on the campaign trail in 2010")
---
_Speaking with a farmer on the campaign trail in 2010._

After Kevin O's Deli and my experience with government overreach, I decided it was time to make a change. I knew public service would be a positive way for me to channel my frustration as a former small business owner, while also helping others in similar situations. Little did I know that working in the California State Assembly would pave the way to holding one of the most prestigious roles in our country: _**Speaker of the House of Representatives.**_
| [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=53f183ad2f744f38af99c70fad2440e6&_e=8XjUR22hPB8ZCLqJrkRDvuQFer0OESCdsck1Saha0CrV-EytxPhFa0eOgNfaiO0sQMG7FIshTZiOsmqb6DZZhNCNE4Tc9vQsuJ-KnGpmaOoBOuTrcDTAWxCmyTXmLg0gWv3tzhwc1nEG-0WyOXjBa2bf3C2kE0Pk2z84rJdEQkHkqkLM9qKHkBrI3MGNFdNpstC9kXCkbRycTt6kkY3AkaC0zrE6s-RB3DGQgewqTzc0o0jN5PRXwhbv0kGZBQBblFr59sIrdMD6fIdEo8A1Q-QejTP4RAIUJZgRGgdqhivrwuxii-eyEZbYYkMVex7Pol2z4mRFl6QJddWvTAzE3TQHDzyVkHPNv6OT4SD4OFStbwQeo91WokDqzxcpA_pwY0KEBupoHe7DL4p7CJiM9Q%3D%3D "Celebrating Republicans’ success in taking back the House in 2022.")
---
_Celebrating Republicans ' success in taking back the House in 2022_

This brings me to my main point: **my Commitment to America isn 't some political ploy - _it 's deeply personal._**

**As Speaker of the House, I promise to deliver on our commitment to America and the American people.

[If you support my efforts as Speaker, please chip in whatever you can afford - $5, $10, even $25 if you can - to help me continue this fight.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=53f183ad2f744f38af99c70fad2440e6&_e=8XjUR22hPB8ZCLqJrkRDvuQFer0OESCdsck1Saha0CrV-EytxPhFa0eOgNfaiO0sQMG7FIshTZiOsmqb6DZZhNCNE4Tc9vQsuJ-KnGpmaOoBOuTrcDTAWxCmyTXmLg0gWv3tzhwc1nEG-0WyOXjBa2bf3C2kE0Pk2z84rJdEQkHkqkLM9qKHkBrI3MGNFdNpstC9kXCkbRycTt6kkY3AkaC0zrE6s-RB3DGQgewqTzek6Xh34-nBDZkSzoCPrccddJSw82XX2qjSkbFAU1LoXZsNcfgPt3d_3NRjKmKUs-S8PLIpZfPnam6QMHvKBkZM_t3kBK7lY0hdhj_QrroW3sT2QAkzM6S7a1bz6xoNraMx1AuYU9hoSBwgf2oIs3FfBtUyRViYNDhkm5_u-351WQ%3D%3D "If you support my efforts as Speaker, please chip in whatever you can afford – $5, $10, even $25 if you can – to help me continue this fight.")**

| | [STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=53f183ad2f744f38af99c70fad2440e6&_e=8XjUR22hPB8ZCLqJrkRDvuQFer0OESCdsck1Saha0CrV-EytxPhFa0eOgNfaiO0sQMG7FIshTZiOsmqb6DZZhNCNE4Tc9vQsuJ-KnGpmaOoBOuTrcDTAWxCmyTXmLg0gWv3tzhwc1nEG-0WyOXjBa2bf3C2kE0Pk2z84rJdEQkHkqkLM9qKHkBrI3MGNFdNpstC9kXCkbRycTt6kkY3AkaC0zrE6s-RB3DGQgewqTzc_td1Avne_18RX2xJYD_Ll6DL8MC7nfpvlL2So4-pme-E8bgQE4OlojyfyuxE71zYSbphN-VgRQ7tBr7hRGeugmFtEEdj3v2m--NEEkKAxpTa0m9gtG0Z8p9_qYCEpT9_Kf5q1ygnxr9e5yeztJncpspB3iY2RNVWbENFLN-tL7w%3D%3D "STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY")
---

If you've read this through to the end, thank you so much for your time. I hope you understand why our commitment to America is so important. I'm so grateful to have your support.

Thank you,

---
| [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=53f183ad2f744f38af99c70fad2440e6&_e=8XjUR22hPB8ZCLqJrkRDvuQFer0OESCdsck1Saha0CrV-EytxPhFa0eOgNfaiO0sQMG7FIshTZiOsmqb6DZZhD0gPCYP8lPzD0VlYn63BJLyZEeT3n0TahKyYQ6GDuQj-kWLIB_9Xq9BJhCRu_dR_uYzP-5Q2-C6tnbWsEEqf3aJsdoJkvhAksDkda_lqbAECUYlOAfZZ9DAjCuJZZ8HFdRd3I1q54HPAXoF1hBkCr0zqpMShgSV4u2kqvcTmLuYZtOQRaLoU7XiGq4HI6HMt9K7Aq6bK1j7UJ7YGr4AJ2mjAkM2Gn3XfJFelImQWDRr4598URjzDeK4Ilp_FfV1N2FRrVvCA_W0WVRIexaDXeWjRcF5wsvMBjR44VI5lO6w "KOM Signature")

| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tccd60d12-d937-4636-a0d1-eead56ddfbae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._

| | | | | Peter, My team says we need to raise $100,000 by our critical fundraising deadline. So, [before I ask you to chip in a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcc99d46f-1fd3-423f-be60-98bf5bf886b0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), here are three reasons why:
1. Sabato’s Crystal Ball ranks Montana a TOSS-UP. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Montana.

2. I’m one of the most vulnerable Democratic senators. Political experts are saying my seat is one of the most likely to flip red unless folks like you help us.

3. Over $70 MILLION was spent in 2018. So we’re gearing up for the most expensive and competitive race Montana has ever seen.

Look, I know the election might seem far away, but the GOP has already launched vicious attack ads against me and I need your immediate help to fight back. Please: [Split a donation between Blue Amp Action and my campaign right now to help us reach our critical $100,000 goal. We’re running out of time. Every dollar will help us block Mitch McConnell from taking over the Senate >> ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf2a7fe2a-71f2-4ead-aea2-20119920070c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! seats to retake the House majority. → races in our favor. → [**3.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66584738/416857531/1662333042?refcode=20230716_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTkzODE3My1mZTIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gnUm0sOyyja5O9OHrqDLXGYsBq-3qOBHNSpp8lkfjnw=) Extreme MAGA Republicans are in complete panic mode. They know if Democrats can raise the necessary funds in time, we’ll flip these five seats and send Republicans back to the minority. [_**We must capitalize on this critical swing. That’s why I just set an ambitious new goal – 2,477 Democratic gifts raised by midnight – to jump on this historic opportunity and rush immediate funds to the races we need to win to take back the majority. name: Greta Kemp Martin
subject: Nearly 100,000 Mississippians are counting on our leaders to act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greta Martin for AG
body:
Mississippi has expanded Medicaid to include 12 months of postpartum coverage – but it’s still not enough

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66586035/416858675/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_PET_230716ME_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWIyMzYwNzQtZmYyMy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JRUFub47zIAh1Rzd87QEI1ijyuYpu4j_S91ep5AUHx4=) Peter,

This month, a new expansion of our state’s Medicaid program went into effect, covering new mothers for 12 months of postpartum coverage instead of two. Peter, this is a great step in the right direction towards ensuring Mississippians can receive the healthcare they need and deserve – but it doesn’t go nearly far enough.

Mississippi is just one of ten states that still haven’t expanded Medicaid using free federal dollars. As it stands right now, expanding Medicaid to meet Federal thresholds would **extend healthcare coverage to over 88,000 Mississippians.**

_That’s almost 100,000 Mississippians who remain uninsured because our state leaders refuse to break from GOP partisan agendas that do far more harm than good._

Peter, this is unacceptable. Our leaders are tasked with sticking up for what’s right for our people and our state. But instead, they would rather allow hospitals to close and sick folks to die. As a disability rights advocate and a Mississippian, I refuse to stand by and watch.

[I’m running for Attorney General because I’m ready to fight for people over politics. But our other state leaders need to get that message, too. Will you join me in calling on Mississippi state leaders to expand Medicaid to save lives today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66586036/416858676/-1257531955?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWIyMzYwNzQtZmYyMy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JRUFub47zIAh1Rzd87QEI1ijyuYpu4j_S91ep5AUHx4=&emci=4a13f36d-ff23-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=5b236074-ff23-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=13214820) [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66586037/416858677/-1257531955?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWIyMzYwNzQtZmYyMy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JRUFub47zIAh1Rzd87QEI1ijyuYpu4j_S91ep5AUHx4=&emci=4a13f36d-ff23-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=5b236074-ff23-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=13214820) We won’t see a change until we make a change, Peter – I hope you’ll join me in demanding action on Medicaid expansion today.

Thank you,

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66586038/416858678/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_PET_230716ME_signoff&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWIyMzYwNzQtZmYyMy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JRUFub47zIAh1Rzd87QEI1ijyuYpu4j_S91ep5AUHx4=)

As Attorney General, Greta will fight for the rights of everyday Mississippians, and stand up for the working people of this state.

name: Susan Swecker
subject: Why us?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
I’m about to ask you to make a donation towards our mid-July fundraising goal, but first I’d like to explain why. The ENTIRE Virginia legislature is up in the air this November. Regardless of which party takes control, it will be by a razor thin margin. Which means we need to be as impactful and intentional as possible when it comes to this election.

|
---
Derek, I’m about to ask you to make a donation towards our mid-July fundraising goal, but first I’d like to explain why. The ENTIRE Virginia legislature is up in the air this November. Regardless of which party takes control, it will be by a razor thin margin. Which means we need to be as impactful and intentional as possible when it comes to this election. The DPVA is uniquely positioned to invest in the races that we need to win to keep our Brick Wall in the Senate and take back the House this fall. We're putting organizers on the ground to make sure we reach every Democratic voter – because when Democrats vote, Democrats win. And when Democrats win, good things happen! name: Colin Allred
subject: I’m running against Ted Cruz [action needed]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc
body:
Will you help me win in Texas?
| [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18793?t=6&akid=1907%2E564421%2EI-DkhC) Friend, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas.

Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country!

**That’s why I need you with me from day one: Please, will you split $3 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Ron Be Gone to help reach my ambitious goal of $500,000?**[**Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. Please donate now →**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18794?t=8&akid=1907%2E564421%2EI-DkhC) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Ron Be Gone and Colin Allred will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18801?t=15&akid=1907%2E564421%2EI-DkhC)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18802?t=16&akid=1907%2E564421%2EI-DkhC)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18803?t=17&akid=1907%2E564421%2EI-DkhC)
I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.

Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:

[**We need to raise $4,000 by MIDNIGHT to fund our crucial work. Will you chip in $1, $3, or anything you can afford today? »**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18794?t=19&akid=1907%2E564421%2EI-DkhC)

Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

_Colin Allred_
[DONATE »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18794?t=21&akid=1907%2E564421%2EI-DkhC)
---

(www.ronbegone.com)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. P.O. Box 30295, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33303

He MUST be defeated in the next election. We're not exaggerating when we say that President Obama changed the world, Peter. From the historic nature of his election to the White House, to the groundbreaking policies and accomplishments of his 8 years in office, we can’t help but look back with pride.

[We’re curious how you feel about President Obama’s legacy. Can you take our official Barack Obama Legacy Questionnaire and give us your thoughts on this remarkable man?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkZo0pYv4bXzD0FrFEKhRKMB54Pk6UOr7bVAwcML5fUBpGQrVtjylTTwpSP1-t4KcUoFTAgif-cX262Dz0cAIcoY_4dVjDvplqQECmRw_OYdbpnbBjsRPmS5vJ4PyB3QSj4VfVhPm0jI7omk-cJ6MYXcF3IxT9SOynRxzIgGWW5fHl5XdZYBGm1gmqrT0iGuCaE56mmm_nrvyE3lpUONwyq0Bk2bapWlOYpDAJusSj8O5KefIAwpExYb3S0bkPqWoQ_1DhizIRFqK1rnYxPqDBv6W2-E-NEby3kS_uaGOOdCl4aVbjLW9T1CNVIJX_oZBeAvi9UTqR8cpomYIuZ0O_CxnmXB-WVuLgUhlVtsLszQKpyKwQhaJrrdExCoFWAZoSl9jge5Ss1YUEC_EbCjdfe/3xx/8eILg-40TTuJtxYiKZ4tuQ/h3/I0pAiYTI8bb_dzyFFaE0PieVyRh_IMfRiys59aWEJnc)

Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

Team, Mark your calendars because the first stop on the 2024 GOP presidential clown tour lands in Iowa. That’s right, starting January 15, the GOP takes their MAGA circus nationwide and we’re gearing up for the most embarrassing tour to date. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66592334/416869696/1975272244?refcode=E3370-20230716-SavetheDate-Image-GOP&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjE5YzQ1Ny0xMDI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KwUwjDvpFqKs5Stui7njDV740KiArSQXpka6EJIUHHY=) Don’t worry, there will be something for everyone! This election line-up will include an indicted former president, former governors, a millionaire, a “woke killer” governor, a whole lot of extremism, and so much more. There is no doubt that the stain MAGA extremism has left on our country will turn next year's GOP caucus into an absolute bloodbath — one where candidates will try to routinely ‘out-extreme’ the other. | [SKIP THE GOP CAUCUS IN '24' »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66592335/416869697/1975272244?refcode=E3370-20230716-SavetheDate-SB-GOP&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjE5YzQ1Ny0xMDI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KwUwjDvpFqKs5Stui7njDV740KiArSQXpka6EJIUHHY=)

Because let us make one thing clear, friend: No matter who comes out on top as the GOP presidential candidate, we know they will be terrible for our country.
Eric is working day and night to ensure that business in Washington remains focused on the issues facing everyday Americans. And in 2024, we can’t let the GOP presidential clown tour distract from the path only democrats are paving forward.

That’s right, starting January 15, the GOP takes their MAGA circus nationwide and we’re gearing up for the most embarrassing tour to date. = Don’t worry, there will be something for everyone! This election line-up will include an indicted former president, former governors, a millionaire, a “woke killer” governor, a whole lot of extremism, and so much more. There is no doubt that the stain MAGA extremism has left on our country will turn next year's GOP caucus into an absolute bloodbath — one where candidates will try to routinely ‘out-extreme’ the other. | = So when we say ‘save the date,’ we really meant sit back, grab some popcorn, and get ready to watch the GOP clowns embarrass themselves in 2024. Because let us make one thing clear, friend: No matter who comes out on top as the GOP presidential candidate, we know they will be terrible for our country. Eric is working day and night to ensure that business in Washington remains focused on the issues facing everyday Americans. We can’t stress enough how important this is. But right now, liberal billionaires are dumping MILLIONS into radical-left candidates to see all of this happen. They want every red holdout scrubbed from the map - but there’s one woman in particular who’s at the top of their list, and that's Rep. Maria Elvira Salazar. As a Latina whose family fled communism, they HATE her because she’s the LOUDEST voice against radical-socialism in the House! And tomorrow is our MAJOR extended mid-July fundraising deadline. If we don’t hit our goal now, all of the momentum we’ve built up grinds to a halt. | | Thank you, Team Salazar | | | | Paid for by Salazar for Congress | | Unsubscribe from future emails

name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: what TX-32 voters want:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Peter,

Thank you. With your support, we crushed our end-of-quarter fundraising goal — _**raising over $360k in the first 6 weeks of our campaign!**_ I am forever grateful for how you showed up to support my campaign.

Our strong launch has made one thing crystal clear: TX-32 voters want leaders in Congress to take action to end the epidemic of gun violence, defend reproductive freedom, and ensure healthcare affordability so our communities can thrive. As a trauma surgeon, I've seen the life-threatening impact to my patients due to policies related to all three of these issues. I know what's at stake.

With the many intersecting crises occurring in our country, I’m answering the call to serve. I will bring my frontline experience to Congress to address the source of preventable suffering and violence harming our communities, and to uplift all who seek a better life. [Can I count on you to stand with me by making a gift of $10 or more today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66592669/416872347/-609881289?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_BW_20230716_FR_JulyMMFR_0_3MO_Dr.BrianWilliams_na_na_MMFR01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTQzZTA4NmMtMTMyNC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9cKwW15UJ6Wa7ijzuuBl-8RvtOpBhBFwWYO3-b7xOG8=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

**My life has been about service, not politics, Peter.**

I decided to run for Congress after realizing I could have a greater impact on my community by repairing systemic issues — not in the OR, but through public policy. As a political appointee in Dallas, and as a policy advisor in Washington, D.C., I learned firsthand that real change is possible when we have leaders bold enough to take courageous action — and as a Veteran, trauma surgeon, and gun safety advocate, that’s exactly what I’ll do in Congress.

[But I need YOUR help to get me there. Will you chip in $10 or any amount to help send me to Congress? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66592676/416872355/-609881289?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_BW_20230716_FR_JulyMMFR_0_3MO_Dr.BrianWilliams_na_na_MMFR01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTQzZTA4NmMtMTMyNC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9cKwW15UJ6Wa7ijzuuBl-8RvtOpBhBFwWYO3-b7xOG8=)

Onward,

Dr. Brian Williams

subject: This Republican poll has Andy and his opponent in a dead heat.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
With just months until Election Day, Andy needs your support right away! Across the Commonwealth, Kentuckians approve of the job Andy is doing as governor. Take a look: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66593306/416876088/-559619491?refcode=em23_230716_poll_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230716_poll_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=0b26199d-1724-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjI2MTk5ZC0xNzI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VuNRMiI6w6vwKKhCWrJ1aBVmE5gTGgv65ICmeL-8ryY=)
But Peter, just because he is the most popular Democratic governor in the entire nation doesn't mean the path to re-election will be easy! There's no question at this point that Kentucky's governor's race is the most competitive election this year.

**A Republican poll shows that Andy is neck-and-neck with his opponent:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66593307/416876089/-559619491?refcode=em23_230716_poll_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230716_poll_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=0b26199d-1724-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjI2MTk5ZC0xNzI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VuNRMiI6w6vwKKhCWrJ1aBVmE5gTGgv65ICmeL-8ryY=) Andy's opponent, Daniel Cameron — _Mitch McConnell's protégé_ — thinks he can defeat Andy. He sees how popular Andy is, so he's using his deep-pocketed dark money groups to try and buy this race. They will spend and do whatever it takes to try to beat Andy and undo Kentucky's progress.

[**Peter: Will you please donate any amount today to Andy's re-election campaign? With the help of Andy's strong grassroots supporters, we can win this tough race and protect the progress Andy's made for clean_body: With just months until Election Day, Andy needs your support right away! Across the Commonwealth, Kentuckians approve of the job Andy is doing as governor. Take a look: = But Peter, just because he is the most popular Democratic governor in the entire nation doesn't mean the path to re-election will be easy! There's no question at this point that Kentucky's governor's race is the most competitive election this year. A Republican poll shows that Andy is neck-and-neck with his opponent: = Andy's opponent, Daniel Cameron — Mitch McConnell's protégé — thinks he can defeat Andy. He sees how popular Andy is, so he's using his deep-pocketed dark money groups to try and buy this race. But we risk losing this essential check on GOP power if Democrats are defeated this November. **Virginia Republicans have already rolled back voting rights, and their proposed budget favors tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy.** If the GOP flips the state Senate and keeps control of the House, abortion rights could be first up on the chopping block. Their far-right governor has already endorsed plans to threaten abortion doctors with jail time – _it's horrible._ **The stakes are high, and we _cannot_ afford to lose. This team has stepped up time and time again to help drive our mission forward, so we know you'll come through this year, too.** [Chip in $7 to heed Hillary Clinton's call to action and support Democrats in critical states like Virginia. clean_body: Republicans across the nation are working tirelessly to keep control of the Virginia House. We’re calling on all of our grassroots donors to help Democrats flip control. | | | | | The results of this November's elections in Virginia will determine the path our country takes for years to come. That’s why Hillary Clinton is calling on grassroots Democrats, including you, to make a difference: For the past two years, our Democratic majority in the state Senate has acted as a barrier against Virginia Republicans' dangerous agenda. But we risk losing this essential check on GOP power if Democrats are defeated this November. Virginia Republicans have already rolled back voting rights, and their proposed budget favors tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy. If the GOP flips the state Senate and keeps control of the House, abortion rights could be first up on the chopping block. Their far-right governor has already endorsed plans to threaten abortion doctors with jail time – it's horrible. The stakes are high, and we cannot afford to lose. This team has stepped up time and time again to help drive our mission forward, so we know you'll come through this year, too. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you for everything. **I just got off the phone with my campaign manager, and it turns out we’re still $8,396 short of our mid-month fundraising goal.**

Now, I am no math whiz, but with hours to go before the deadline, these numbers aren’t looking good. [Can you rush a donation of whatever amount is right for you to help me bridge our fundraising gap before midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66593582/416877666/-761526316?refcode=ea.e4a8d6cd-1b24-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ms=ea.e4a8d6cd-1b24-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTRhOGQ2Y2QtMWIyNC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GdRceVhtvKBAuIYt5iB7kcI0uor_pccBhuoMo3txZtU=)

Our team has been busting their butts to reach voters all over Mississippi. They're hitting the streets, making calls, sending out mail, and doing whatever it takes to win this thing in November.

But all these tools and resources we're using come at a cost, and a pretty hefty one at that. That's why hitting this deadline, and every deadline leading up to November, is absolutely crucial.

[There’s no way I am going to sit back and let Tate Reeves win this race and run Mississippi to the ground. clean_body: And I don’t like what I heard. | = = Peter, I know it’s Sunday, but I wanted to reach out with a quick update. I just got off the phone with my campaign manager, and it turns out we’re still $8,396 short of our mid-month fundraising goal. Now, I am no math whiz, but with hours to go before the deadline, these numbers aren’t looking good. = Our team has been busting their butts to reach voters all over Mississippi. They're hitting the streets, making calls, sending out mail, and doing whatever it takes to win this thing in November. But all these tools and resources we're using come at a cost, and a pretty hefty one at that. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Iconic monarch butterflies are endangered while Bayer-Monsanto profits
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1879310?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT: Help save endangered monarch butterflies from Big Ag’s corporate greed before it’s too late![Take action now! >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1879311?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** A tiny monarch caterpillar emerges from its egg perched upon a milkweed plant. The little creature will eat its own eggshell before converting over to a strict diet of only milkweed, the same plant on which it was born. This plant is crucial to monarchs, especially at these early stages of life. Once this hatchling is strong enough, it will build a cocoon before transforming into a gorgeous butterfly, spreading its wings with vibrant orange and intricate black patterns. But this summer, you might be seeing less of this backyard beauty. These iconic pollinators are now _**ENDANGERED**_ and dying out rapidly. A key contributor to the massive decline in monarchs is the disappearance of milkweed. **Where has all the milkweed gone, Friend?** Glyphosate, the active ingredient in Bayer-Monsanto’s Roundup, is wiping out this crucial plant that is vital to monarchs’ survival — all because the greedy pesticide industry continues to prioritize PROFIT above pollinators and the planet. **We must take action NOW to protect endangered monarch butterflies before it’s too late to save these beloved pollinators from EXTINCTION! ** [**ADD YOUR NAME: Tell Bayer-Monsanto to STOP selling butterfly-toxic Roundup! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1879312?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1879313?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
We’ve lost over _**850 milkweed plants**_ in the past two decades, Friend, so time is running out. **Over the same period, 90% of the North American monarch population disappeared** — and if we don’t demand accountability from Big Ag, these endangered pollinators could go _**EXTINCT FOREVER.**_
Bayer-Monsanto has been caught lying to the public by _**manipulating science**_ and _**evading pesticide regulations**_ in order to continue making a profit off of Roundup, despite knowing the dangers of this harmful product.
In fact, Bayer-Monsanto’s lies are _**so dangerous**_ that it’s putting people directly at risk too, Friend. Aside from threatening monarchs and the planet, glyphosate has been linked to human health impacts like **cancer and reproductive harms** — with children being the most AT RISK!
_**Bayer-Monsanto’s corporate greed has gone too far, Friend, and we MUST speak up if we’re going to put an end to it before more damage is done.**_
Please, Friend, we need 3,204 more grassroots environmentalists like you to stand with us and DEMAND that Roundup is pulled off the market right away. [**Can we count on you to sign our petition by 11:59 P.M tonight to help STOP Bayer-Monsanto from putting people, pollinators, and the planet in danger?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1879314?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1879313?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for taking urgent action to protect pollinators!
Friends of the Earth**
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](foe.org/about-us/contact/)
---
##### Email Preferences:
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/subscribe?campaignpageurl=https%3A%2F%2Faction.foe.org%2Fpage%2F2555%2Fsubscriptions%2F1%3Fea.broadcast.id%3D248085&ea.campaigner.email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC)

[www.foe.org/news](http://www.foe.org/news) [www.foe.org/about-us](http://www.foe.org/about-us) [www.foeaction.org](http://www.foeaction.org)

subject: Sorry for the long email, but this needs some explaining
body:
[ [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=9a3a97ebb7ed4964b497073deac430f7&_t=hvaXPOAspIVURY-tOzXdK4-O9yYMBntkWg6ez64LXx4YsEcfprPcG0hDCjczW41KRrwH-LuZ5aFWO6FW5Fv14ctGTrYmcmeoHZPNkpu2PWM%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=9a3a97ebb7ed4964b497073deac430f7&_t=hvaXPOAspIVURY-tOzXdK4-O9yYMBntkWg6ez64LXx4YsEcfprPcG0hDCjczW41KRrwH-LuZ5aFWO6FW5Fv14ctGTrYmcmeoHZPNkpu2PWM%3D)

](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9a3a97ebb7ed4964b497073deac430f7&_e=SWVuKFnfS3EFkEuEd49T_AXUV7SeKiezlG4T22sExu8UiziMuwqH77Xib8stzJDCJten1ol1AyqnLTcAP3XYQHdZk4eyxCW_JeVaZeg_w1b7nDXz5A78yOghQgULKs0Wlm9DFSMk4ft3Yg3dFqKzf0u7GvdzHcTt5j_yA-LW1d2eu_yBHCxw7AIjw1RNW1VcEpHvm3JiEarvmnqwT5fTxRFeS0XQ6fUfG0nZPg39TNo%3D)

Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz

Fellow Conservative,

Please forgive me for sending you a long email.

But it's about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, _Unwoke_ , I detail what is happening in our schools:
* Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division.
* Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents.
* Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult.

**Like me, I 'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money...**

They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds.

_I 'd like to break the rules._

Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools.

**I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away.**

[Please donate $10, $35, $250, or any amount you can generously contribute >>](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9a3a97ebb7ed4964b497073deac430f7&_e=SWVuKFnfS3EFkEuEd49T_AXUV7SeKiezlG4T22sExu8UiziMuwqH77Xib8stzJDCJten1ol1AyqnLTcAP3XYQJ4q22DnHmUNKcrBdoNKqBEyCWlt1qLVrFWK_UDV54VM_FLtKCanQydfviQoB8lW4WYOafAQkb4nvnOT1nG1hZD04Vl4GNSLq7O7Q8ORI2U3neuVEtN4tpw9k2SzjnrAxkeNveSHWQDXp0QgkmL42wc%3D)

The radical indoctrination of our education didn't occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won't fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They've been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country.

Here's what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations.
Defending Parental Rights
While in her 13-year-old daughter's room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder--an undergarment used to flatten breasts.

Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber's daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents.

The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions.

This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it's the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law.

[Can you contribute to the Goldwater Institute by donating $10, $35, or any amount today? clean_body: | ]() Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz Fellow Conservative, Please forgive me for sending you a long email. But it's about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, Unwoke , I detail what is happening in our schools: Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division. Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents. Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult. Like me, I 'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money... They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds. I 'd like to break the rules. Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools. I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away. The radical indoctrination of our education didn't occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won't fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They've been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country. Here's what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations. Defending Parental Rights While in her 13-year-old daughter's room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder--an undergarment used to flatten breasts. Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber's daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents. The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions. This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it's the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law. School Choice Every parent deserves to send their children to the school that best fits their needs. Low-income families should not be stuck in failing school districts, and all parents should have the option to take their kids out of schools indoctrinating them in leftist nonsense.
