Through their efforts, Arizona was the first state to pass universal school choice, giving all families access to the educational options most suitable to them. The Goldwater Institute's exemplary school choice legislation set a precedent for the rest of the nation. Goldwater has assisted Iowa, Michigan, Utah, and West Virginia in implementing universal school choice programs, and they have no intention of stopping until school choice is a nationwide reality. Defeating DEI Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion is a new woke cult sweeping our institutions, particularly our universities. It's so out of hand that universities are now making pledges to DEI principles as part of their faculty hiring process. Defeating DEI is the Goldwater Institute's latest initiative. Their legislative plan is simple: Public universities will be explicitly prohibited from using political tests to screen out applicants in any admissions, hiring, or promotion-related decision or from granting preferential consideration to applicants for their support of partisan, political, or ideological beliefs. In summary, the legislation will eliminate the use of DEI in schools. Now is the time to step on the throttle and defeat the cultural Marxists. The Goldwater Institute needs your help today, Fellow Conservative. I am personally asking you to donate any amount you can to the Goldwater Institute and help me raise $50,000 for them. They are on the frontlines in the battles most important to conservatives. Please select an amount today to rush your support.** The Goldwater Institute doesn't have woke billionaires or corporations supporting them. They don't have the media on their side. There are no Hollywood movies that support this cause. They rely on the support of like-minded individuals like you to fund their programs. Thank you for your time and your continued support. Ted Cruz The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661.

subject: Next steps in the student loan battle
disclaimer_text: Paid For By The Future Forum Political Action Committee And Not Authorized By Any Candidate Or Candidate's Committee
body:
Update: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66594262/416880522/401321728?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI3YzNiOTgxLTIyMjQtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ijmS1oor95sFVzsbpTytbVGZaVHfNIaWNu3umd_OsQE=&emci=6c946bbf-bd21-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=27c3b981-2224-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=25540290) Peter, We are deeply disappointed that the Supreme Court overturned President Biden’s student loan forgiveness program that would have canceled student debt for millions of Americans. However, the fight is not over. President Biden and Democrats in Congress are committed to providing the student debt relief our country needs. It’s going to take a little longer now, but here are the next steps in the student loan battle:
1. **First,** President Biden has announced a new plan to cancel student debt under a provision of the Higher Education Act. It will likely face challenges like the last one, but the legal foundation is sound and we hope it will prevail in court.

2. **Second,** the Biden Administration is implementing a new repayment plan that will allow millions of borrowers to pay as little as $0, without interest. And in as little as 10 years, any remaining debt will be canceled.

[_**These steps will make sure student loan borrowers get the relief they need. Will you add your name to thank President Biden for keeping up the fight?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66594263/416880525/401321728?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI3YzNiOTgxLTIyMjQtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ijmS1oor95sFVzsbpTytbVGZaVHfNIaWNu3umd_OsQE=&emci=6c946bbf-bd21-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=27c3b981-2224-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=25540290) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66594264/416880526/401321728?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI3YzNiOTgxLTIyMjQtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ijmS1oor95sFVzsbpTytbVGZaVHfNIaWNu3umd_OsQE=&emci=6c946bbf-bd21-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=27c3b981-2224-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=25540290) \- Future Forum PAC

While Founding Membership enrollment closed, President Trump decided at the beginning of the new quarter to re-open enrollment ONLY for his most trusted DONORS like YOU. Now that it’s evident that the Democrats’ playbook is to launch endless witch hunts to try and take us down, YOUR Founding Membership has never been more critical. But, as of the last time we checked the roster, we didn’t see you had accepted your invitation yet: | THE PRESIDENT’S TRUST Invitation for: dpwillis67@gmail.com Founding Member Acceptance: PENDING | Thank you, Trump Member Services \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Wed, Feb 22, 2023 Subject: You’re a loyal defender of our movement To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> | | Friend, Our country needs you. The Deep State will do everything in their power to destroy me and stop YOU from having a voice in your own country. Now that polls show we’d CRUSH Biden in a landslide, the Deep State is inciting more witch hunts to try and eliminate our campaign and end the America First movement. That’s why I’m inviting YOU – one of my most trusted supporters – to become a Founding Member of the PRESIDENT’S TRUST to defend our movement from the Deep State’s attacks. | The Deep State has wanted to destroy me ever since I first vowed to fight for the American people. And now they see that our movement is stronger than ever before. We’re winning the Republican primary by double digits. We’re beating any and all possible Democrat nominees – including both Biden and Kamala. So now, they can only resort to abusing the system to try and sabotage the only political movement that promises to put power back in the hands of the people of our country. But I trust you won’t let them get away with it. We need to save America – and 2024 is our final chance. Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

name: Jim Jordan
subject: It’s worse than I thought …
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016.

|

Fellow American

We thought the government was pressuring Big Tech to censor stories about Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings and his laptop days before the 2020 presidential election...**then brave journalists exposed the Twitter Files.**

We thought that it was likely that COVID came from a lab. Then FBI Director Christopher Wray confirmed this spring that coronavirus likely stemmed from a lab leak in Wuhan.

We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the **Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016.**

**With every new bit of infomation we find that the truth is always worse than we thought.**

Whether it is the CDC or the DOJ, the FBI and social media companies taking down posts and limiting speech, **federal agencies are targeting the American people who they are supposed to serve**. And the Democrats? **They always seem to turn a blind eye and move on.**

[**WILL YOU HELP ME HOLD GOVERNMENT ACCOUNTABLE?
-> -> -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e2478520a02f48ccbce6c853fea6f84a&_e=UQICyt5YjC4hj--ve1hC0_uWAfG3G5DOF-NcQ22WUpR49YOYPkLsiVxkVMJ76z-p64qYCaHY8e15rNSVDe6RMYmTo6UtEc9tZ708dZ7EcEkcYOLU4pZGjNDt8fKSQZ4dpEke7sBtZqQwDDkWeH46EqemPhFKlhvmDM424C6nj5-sEOncpe9NsDC3GP4vmBWnAc3gqzEzjjbG6DacnGPPet6UFB_ITIwxaRqx4zQ45ZTRcPWKpWrJqd-oS7eRE4WhyNg3PYF1wzEm0orowZb38oqxaYIUezAB_c-YOXW2gy1Dsx-Yco9hFaF7PIIAg6Su16xHwDxHYA0J98GoGVoZhQ6oP1m7XXiRatRZsLhEwO6MU1c-W0wNpch2qRoycBeX6QTWqoLEPKxRgB6wN3si4dzYQvf1tIJSO4J1WWodZdM%3D)
**I am in Washington to fight for YOU**. I don’t think the government should be targeting people on the Right OR the Left. But I must admit, **this fight has put a HUGE target on my back** , a target that will no doubt grow larger as the election approaches, **[which is why I am reaching out- I need your help today](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e2478520a02f48ccbce6c853fea6f84a&_e=UQICyt5YjC4hj--ve1hC0_uWAfG3G5DOF-NcQ22WUpR49YOYPkLsiVxkVMJ76z-p64qYCaHY8e15rNSVDe6RMYmTo6UtEc9tZ708dZ7EcEkcYOLU4pZGjNDt8fKSQZ4dpEke7sBtZqQwDDkWeH46EqemPhFKlhvmDM424C6nj5-sEOncpe9NsDC3GP4vmBWnAc3gqzEzjjbG6DacnGPPet6UFB_ITIwxaRqx4zQ45ZTRcPWKpWrJqd-oS7eRE4WhyNg3PYF1wzEm0orowZb38onjzVg20KGBHqMQQiloFwyiP5sXiERuskJU6ONPhegHo2JVTWWpM0y2kp5nqn19i0dWgf71X388rc-LNTTz0MTLPv5dsz6jx85gg9VwStcpG279-iJvK_G21FDuVoYxnjOsltB7hZEyVzcDJ7jUNdg%3D)**.

I’ll never stop standing on the frontlines in defense of our constitutionally enshrined liberties. That said, I need supporters like you ready to do battle along side me - because the Democrats will do whatever they can to boot me out of Washington.

As a personal favor to me, **[would you please make an immediate contribution of $10 or more right now?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e2478520a02f48ccbce6c853fea6f84a&_e=UQICyt5YjC4hj--ve1hC0_uWAfG3G5DOF-NcQ22WUpR49YOYPkLsiVxkVMJ76z-p64qYCaHY8e15rNSVDe6RMYmTo6UtEc9tZ708dZ7EcEkcYOLU4pZGjNDt8fKSQZ4dpEke7sBtZqQwDDkWeH46EqemPhFKlhvmDM424C6nj5-sEOncpe9NsDC3GP4vmBWnAc3gqzEzjjbG6DacnGPPet6UFB_ITIwxaRqx4zQ45ZTRcPWKpWrJqd-oS7eRE4WhyNg3PYF1wzEm0orowZb38kn92bZu5tiNKi-ZtxWNWYvffRGv7wZCXqMSnTJ67sd2v0dWJO7jHIoWNN1ME6r65jHqGWO6idMPBbmrzlNIagBPuWivjhCxMQ3lPKtojWlipFtjuQAiEhZfAopLywZUHAs4NM9cFIk1XCUJhtsIbf0%3D) **

Make no mistake, Fellow American- our way of life is under attack from the Left, and I need my team of top supporters willing to stand by my side to help push back against the assaults on limited government and individual liberty.**I need your help to fight back against those who want to transform our great Republic into a socialist utopia.**

**[If you’re with me, please make an immediate contribution of $10, $50, $100, $25, or even just $2 right now.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e2478520a02f48ccbce6c853fea6f84a&_e=UQICyt5YjC4hj--ve1hC0_uWAfG3G5DOF-NcQ22WUpR49YOYPkLsiVxkVMJ76z-p64qYCaHY8e15rNSVDe6RMYmTo6UtEc9tZ708dZ7EcEkcYOLU4pZGjNDt8fKSQZ4dpEke7sBtZqQwDDkWeH46EqemPhFKlhvmDM424C6nj5-sEOncpe9NsDC3GP4vmBWnAc3gqzEzjjbG6DacnGPPet6UFB_ITIwxaRqx4zQ45ZTRcPWKpWrJqd-oS7eRE4WhyNg3PYF1wzEm0orowZb38o8YPui2jcWI35i85kJb_iuAUmmR24IvQC0ji5ZQqsaTEt7jN0uLcjdrLJCHDYRpNtUpdeSmmpwU2i--JrvGM6oZiqtOhNSTnN8_c1RDJOHxGZ3cI1jFEDbF0mkGGpYLfSwibO6j24uiPvdJYcLNdWI%3D)**

I'm proud to stand with you as we work to stop the far Left from making our country unrecognizeable.

God Bless,
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e2478520a02f48ccbce6c853fea6f84a&_e=UQICyt5YjC4hj--ve1hC01nKiE-TEF3bTjFTmv4_-K-L8B3no3aLPNKNPKqWqGvKenxD8WVsRIHQQa8vSpVJr-TVwpRvI8wy4W0_7uLMaQsTTQZSe9uC3v3NIG9lmTpes37vioGX5dRkYJG9G8beHQFdAtTEyFSMXHu7wiZwrx2s_LcTvayEHXf5cxb-JLZiUmvquM3HJ4lVqHuK3MVepg%3D%3D)
Jim Jordan

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

** [ ** JOIN JIM ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e2478520a02f48ccbce6c853fea6f84a&_e=UQICyt5YjC4hj--ve1hC0_uWAfG3G5DOF-NcQ22WUpR49YOYPkLsiVxkVMJ76z-p64qYCaHY8e15rNSVDe6RMYmTo6UtEc9tZ708dZ7EcEkcYOLU4pZGjNDt8fKSQZ4dpEke7sBtZqQwDDkWeH46EqemPhFKlhvmDM424C6nj5-sEOncpe9NsDC3GP4vmBWnAc3gqzEzjjbG6DacnGPPet6UFB_ITIwxaRqx4zQ45ZTRcPWKpWrJqd-oS7eRE4WhyNg3PYF1wzEm0orowZb38raghypKoHsQhlL0NPfBH_Af9X8fGa6ANZcV3w1MVwjZYOZvnjQcgtUf02Vu0y3tHq6r25MGN86h1FBW25340wt1HMw9xd_RtQYKf_iDx3Kh5tGlP9HcNrSIyjMEf4WO8Wk8Lp97K6KPw5Ly8vFSLv4%3D)

name: Districts for Democracy
subject: This can’t go unanswered
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Districts for Democracy
body:
| | **Last Monday, following objections from the right-wing extremist group Moms for Liberty, five books were pulled from the libraries of Leon County schools in Florida – including the New York Times best selling young adult novel,_Me, Earl, and the Dying Girl._**

Every single day, our children’s freedom to read and learn is being jeopardized by politically driven attacks. Every day, we read another story about books being pulled from library shelves, and about teachers censoring themselves in the classroom for fear of being publicly vilified or fired from their jobs. It’s happening because the MAGA right organized to win school board elections, and we did not.

That has to change now. [That’s why we need _your_ support to help us stop the MAGA school takeover plan this November, and keep these partisan culture wars out of our kids’ lives. This is not the first time Moms for Liberty and its allied groups have done something like this, and it certainly won’t be the last. In Tennessee, one chapter demanded the removal of a book about Martin Luther King Jr, claiming it was “anti-American.” In Bernards Township, New Jersey, school board members these groups elected have banned high school textbooks about American history and current events.

[It is time we stood up for what matters. Will you join us at Districts for Democracy and chip in to protect our democracy and our public schools?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66594857/416882704/1647078566?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230715_FR_MMFR_0_DistrictsforDemocracy_NA_NA_MMFR.1&refcode2=e70a3895-2524-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzBhMzg5NS0yNTI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tayJNfoOU-kzkHqLgxK1hqQA6oyxy6sqHfwVFWUWCG8=)

clean_body: | | Last Monday, following objections from the right-wing extremist group Moms for Liberty, five books were pulled from the libraries of Leon County schools in Florida – including the New York Times best selling young adult novel,Me, Earl, and the Dying Girl. Every single day, our children’s freedom to read and learn is being jeopardized by politically driven attacks. Every day, we read another story about books being pulled from library shelves, and about teachers censoring themselves in the classroom for fear of being publicly vilified or fired from their jobs. It’s happening because the MAGA right organized to win school board elections, and we did not. That has to change now. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = This is not the first time Moms for Liberty and its allied groups have done something like this, and it certainly won’t be the last. name: Katie Porter
subject: Suspiciously well-targeted ads: Tax companies shared data with Google and Meta
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
They charge you a fee and then share your data with Meta.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=26614%2E3422442%2E52HHlR)
There are a lot of big industries on my sh*t list, Derek. But high on that list are tax prep companies.
The IRS often has all the information it needs to send you a tax return, but these massive corporations profit off of being a middle-man. Every year they lobby Congress so they can continue profiting off of taxpayers. But it gets worse. Now, an investigation I was a part of found that they sold user data to Google and Meta.
[](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kp4s-em20230716-stand-with-consumers/?source=EMAJ16_1_TAX_20230716_V1_F&akid=26614%2E3422442%2E52HHlR)
This investigation could lead to legal action and I’ll keep pushing for answers from these companies.
**Taxpayers are waiting for the IRS to develop a free and simple way to do their taxes so that we don’t have to rely on these corporations.** As soon as next year that could be a reality, and I’ve been pushing the IRS to make this available to as many Americans as possible.
I’ll always stand with consumers, not predatory corporations. [**Sign on to show your support for holding these bad actors accountable.**](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kp4s-em20230716-stand-with-consumers/?source=EMAJ16_1_TAX_20230716_V1_F&akid=26614%2E3422442%2E52HHlR)
**[Sign the Petiton ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kp4s-em20230716-stand-with-consumers/?source=EMAJ16_1_TAX_20230716_V1_F&akid=26614%2E3422442%2E52HHlR)**
Thank you!
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAJ16_1_TAX_20230716_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=26614_3422442_52HHlR&akid=26614%2E3422442%2E52HHlR)**

| | Did you see my team’s email yesterday, Derek? Now that we’re past the primaries, it looks like the GOP in Virginia decided to ramp up their game... _And they’re doing it by ripping a page straight out of Democrats’ playbook._ After years of conservatives trying to discredit early voting through bogus claims about fraudulent absentee voting, Virginia Republicans are making a big investment in early voting. The thing is, there’s no point in dwelling on the hypocrisy. Instead, I’m going to say one thing: We have to take this seriously. If the GOP is stepping up their game, we’ll step up ours. The reason for their change of heart on early voting is straightforward. There’s 140 seats up for grabs in the General Assembly and they know that if they don’t ramp up their efforts now, Democrats are going to hold on to the state Senate and take back the House of Delegates to turn Virginia blue. **_[We need a massive grassroots turnout today to fight back against the VA GOP’s latest efforts to win full control of the General Assembly in the fall. clean_body: did you see their new website? | | | Did you see my team’s email yesterday, Derek? Now that we’re past the primaries, it looks like the GOP in Virginia decided to ramp up their game... And they’re doing it by ripping a page straight out of Democrats’ playbook. After years of conservatives trying to discredit early voting through bogus claims about fraudulent absentee voting, Virginia Republicans are making a big investment in early voting. The thing is, there’s no point in dwelling on the hypocrisy. Instead, I’m going to say one thing: We have to take this seriously. If the GOP is stepping up their game, we’ll step up ours. The reason for their change of heart on early voting is straightforward. There’s 140 seats up for grabs in the General Assembly and they know that if they don’t ramp up their efforts now, Democrats are going to hold on to the state Senate and take back the House of Delegates to turn Virginia blue. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = At the end of the day, I’m hopeful this spells the end of Republicans’ fear mongering around early voting. name: Senator Marco Rubio
subject: Taking back our majority in 2024

body:
| | | If we’re going to take back our Senate majority, we need to make sure we’re holding onto every single seat we have now.

_**And this year, everything could come down to Florida.** _

Rick Scott is running for re-election, and I’m proud to support him.

He’s the kind of freedom fighter we need in Washington.

**But Rick’s unapologetic conservatism means that the Left has a target on his back, and they’re breaking out their biggest donors to try and defeat him.**

_But I’m not about to let that happen._

Right now, I’m calling on my most dependable supporters to help fuel our fight to _DEFEND_ Florida - [**can I count on you?**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=546a712b754c4ebfac06b93c82af0e6b&_e=0FZJXdsRVyjCKFsIVyl2qop7SuyVNsoDqqTKM7mVcBDkkfZFdClmJLZiTZ7d-Ii94TEtJneswTLZZ5PqhoZU2cbggx2lWFF-11dI2zEHmd5TFUvf93P8CifKd0AHjXueiOdzGxF74DyTXkbwqC1gXA9C1HvSR9u9LZeNyPMW1SV68c_jxt9O0atKKC2LJ3yOym8ksj9QLysWpwFkYi1FAfoMJN1Ob0ZrGkSSCduUmxyBxEJ-3dKsuVKtEouiY5PVxYdMY5wUH9jnfblSCTrk7a5wzDiewJx2wtTM4aIXuFG7OHBCfVXRYD1tJWrvlwRTCllwNwOBQG7QOEGe_UFViXco-MQOU5RB5pq1I9WJy707TGX_KVbit2kI7YovX9tf)

We can’t take Florida’s conservative leadership for granted.

It may feel like we have a solid grip on our state now, but the Democrats are doing everything they can to attack us and bring us down.

**The last time he ran for re-election, Rick won by less than 1% of the vote.**

We need all hands on deck in this race, and I’m counting on you to help us.

_A message for you, from Senator Rick Scott:_ Joe Biden’s America includes record high inflation, open borders, unlimited spending, and increasing crime. Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. Rick Scott is running for re-election, and I’m proud to support him. He’s the kind of freedom fighter we need in Washington. But Rick’s unapologetic conservatism means that the Left has a target on his back, and they’re breaking out their biggest donors to try and defeat him. But I’m not about to let that happen. Right now, I’m calling on my most dependable supporters to help fuel our fight to DEFEND Florida - We can’t take Florida’s conservative leadership for granted. It may feel like we have a solid grip on our state now, but the Democrats are doing everything they can to attack us and bring us down. The last time he ran for re-election, Rick won by less than 1% of the vote. name: Aaron Chappell, Political Director
subject: what’s in store for 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

We have a concrete plan of action to leverage progressive power heading into 2024 - when progressives will be a key voting bloc that can’t be ignored.

As a long-time organizer, I’ve been at the forefront of critical fights and felt the thrill of winning big as well as the heartbreak of missed opportunities. That’s why I wanted to personally reach out today about our mission in this moment.

Many people are understandably feeling frustrated and betrayed by politicians, but we cannot lose strength and solidarity — especially when we have a clear path to victory on critical issues that raise the standard of living for working-class Americans.

Will you invest in our deep organizing now by becoming a MOVEMENT BUILDER and help us sustain our fight during the next 6 months?
https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8848?t=1008&akid=4461%2E5885482%2EGbeYBW

Organizing for transformative change isn’t easy - and it requires financial resources to recruit and train good organizers to mobilize the grassroots to keep fighting the corporate class.

As we get ready for 2024, your recurring donation - whether it’s just $5 or $10 a month - is a meaningful investment that will sustain our work in all of these areas:

Cancel Student Debt - Joe Biden made a promise, and we’re not going to allow the right-wing Supreme Court to get the last word on the issue. That’s why we’re ramping up pressure on the President to deliver for 45 million student debtors and their families in 2024. This week, our members shared their powerful stories with Rep. Ro Khanna at the Our Revolution Town Hall, and we’re organizing our members to testify at an important student debt hearing at the Department of Education on Tuesday.
Your monthly donation helps our organizers do the work of making sure these brave advocates are heard at this turning point when student debt relief hangs in the balance.

Raise the Wage - Our Revolution is partnering with One Fair Wage to put a $20+ MINIMUM WAGE on the ballot in critical swing states like OH and AZ in 2024. Not only will this motivate our voters to the polls, but it will mean millions of people getting a long overdue pay raise so they no longer have to choose between rent and groceries.
End Fossil Fuels - The climate fight is heating up right now as Manchin, Sinema, and the GOP prepare to double down on fossil fuel drilling in upcoming must-pass bills this fall. Right now, we’re teaming up with our allies at Greenpeace and Friends of the Earth to make sure progressives in Congress have enough votes to block Big Oil.
End Medical Debt & Big Pharma Price Gouging - Bernie is leveraging his power as HELP Chair in the Senate to block nominees in exchange for lower drug prices, and our members are organizing on the outside to stop medical debt by taking on price-gouging hospitals and predatory debt collectors. We can win this.
We are tackling each of these issues strategically and aggressively because these are the issues that matter most to our membership base - and Democrats cannot afford to fail in this moment. Help us win these fights with a recurring donation of $5 or $10 a month — any amount helps!

We have a concrete plan to win on these issues, and we have the people on our side. We just need the resources to mobilize our grassroots movement into action and execute on our strategy.
https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8848?t=1009&akid=4461%2E5885482%2EGbeYBW

We are more powerful than we realize, and the ruling class would love nothing more than for us to back down now. Let’s show them the power of our movement.
https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8848?t=1010&akid=4461%2E5885482%2EGbeYBW

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230716_FR_recurring_0_3MO_aaron_na_na_recurring&t=1001&akid=4461%2E5885482%2EGbeYBW ]Support Our Revolution →

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=4461%2E5885482%2EGbeYBW ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1003&akid=4461%2E5885482%2EGbeYBW ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1004&akid=4461%2E5885482%2EGbeYBW ][IMG]

Our Revolution is a national grassroots network of local groups dedicated
to organizing a political revolution powerful enough to challenge the
structural forces that threaten our survival as a society. From city halls
to the halls of Congress, our movement is fighting to win progressive
issue fights, elect progressive champions, transform the Democratic party
and get big money out of politics. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230716_FR_recurring_0_3MO_aaron_na_na_recurring&t=1005&akid=4461%2E5885482%2EGbeYBW ]Help us achieve these goals by
donating today.

Join our movement by [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1006&akid=4461%2E5885482%2EGbeYBW ]following us on Facebook and [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/738?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230716_FR_recurring_0_3MO_aaron_na_na_recurring&t=1007&akid=4461%2E5885482%2EGbeYBW ]signing up here.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=4461%2E5885482%2EGbeYBW

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

name: Equal Rights Amendment Update
subject: we're calling on 20,000 Democrats to add their names in support of the ERA before midnight tonight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
| | **_BREAKING FROM WASHINGTON:_
Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand introduces joint resolution to certify the Equal Rights Amendment and enshrine reproductive rights in the Constitution.**
---
**Now, we're calling on 20,000 Democrats to add their names in support of the ERA before midnight tonight. [_Please, friend, will you sign on now?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66595810/416886518/1555738728?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=10&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4302-su-nd&refcode=jtk4302-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzI2MjM3NS0zMTI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LWVO4xs8xhpLBi6ZHR07W1R14xkiSFoGTDETh8kwBfg=&emci=5ecae20d-5822-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=ec262375-3124-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**

| | [SIGN ON NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66595811/416886519/1555738728?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=10&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4302-su-nd&refcode=jtk4302-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzI2MjM3NS0zMTI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LWVO4xs8xhpLBi6ZHR07W1R14xkiSFoGTDETh8kwBfg=&emci=5ecae20d-5822-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=ec262375-3124-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)
---
Friend, the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) would establish that our civil rights cannot be infringed upon or taken away on the basis of gender. Activists have been fighting for 100 years to add this amendment to our Constitution — and we can't wait any longer.
**When the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , they took away the right for half of the population to access the health care they need. **It's discrimination based on sex — plain and simple.
Thankfully, we're closer than ever before to certifying the ERA: 38 states have ratified it — now, it's just one signature away from being added to the Constitution. _But an arbitrary deadline is stopping us from finally certifying this amendment!_
**That's why Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand has introduced a new joint resolution that would establish that this deadline should _not_ stop us from certifying the ERA. **With bipartisan support and filibuster reform, we can pass this joint resolution and finally establish gender equality in our Constitution.
This is a crucial moment in our fight for gender equality and reproductive rights. Kirsten needs to know where grassroots activists like you stand on the ERA. **[_Please, will you add your name before midnight to show Kirsten that you support the ERA? She's counting on 20,000 signatures before midnight tonight!_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66595812/416886520/1555738728?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=10&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4302-su-nd&refcode=jtk4302-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzI2MjM3NS0zMTI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LWVO4xs8xhpLBi6ZHR07W1R14xkiSFoGTDETh8kwBfg=&emci=5ecae20d-5822-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=ec262375-3124-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**
| | [SIGN ON NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66595813/416886521/1555738728?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=10&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4302-su-nd&refcode=jtk4302-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzI2MjM3NS0zMTI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LWVO4xs8xhpLBi6ZHR07W1R14xkiSFoGTDETh8kwBfg=&emci=5ecae20d-5822-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=ec262375-3124-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)
---
|
* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66595814/416886522/1575385346?code=jtk4302-su-nd&refcode=jtk4302-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzI2MjM3NS0zMTI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LWVO4xs8xhpLBi6ZHR07W1R14xkiSFoGTDETh8kwBfg=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66595815/416886523/1575385346?code=jtk4302-su-nd&refcode=jtk4302-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzI2MjM3NS0zMTI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LWVO4xs8xhpLBi6ZHR07W1R14xkiSFoGTDETh8kwBfg=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66595816/416886524/1575385346?code=jtk4302-su-nd&refcode=jtk4302-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzI2MjM3NS0zMTI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LWVO4xs8xhpLBi6ZHR07W1R14xkiSFoGTDETh8kwBfg=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

But an arbitrary deadline is stopping us from finally certifying this amendment! That's why Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand has introduced a new joint resolution that would establish that this deadline should not stop us from certifying the ERA. With bipartisan support and filibuster reform, we can pass this joint resolution and finally establish gender equality in our Constitution. This is a crucial moment in our fight for gender equality and reproductive rights. Kirsten needs to know where grassroots activists like you stand on the ERA. | | | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand
